name: Team Smith
subject: New poll ➡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
See the new poll that shows the state of this race.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be2d/c1f7015/6b89c7fb/1142ee2a/1081274282/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180629PM-logo") **MINNESOTA STATEWIDE POLL:** **Karin Housley (R):** 39%
**Tina Smith (D):** 48%
**Undecided:** 13% BREAKING: This race is within single digits and there are a huge number of undecided voters. Senate Republicans already have this race in their top ten targets, and this poll will raise the stakes even higher. They are desperate to win in Minnesota and show that they can beat the blue wave we all are working so hard for in November. **If you 've been waiting to make your first contribution -- this is the time. There's too much at stake to fall even a dollar short of our goal. ** **[Make your first contribution of $5 or whatever you are able before our FEC deadline at midnight tomorrow. Every dollar makes a difference and every contribution sends a message about the power of this team.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be2d/c1f7015/6b89c7fb/1142ee2b/1081274282/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180629PM-ND") ** If Republicans and their super PACs see any weakness from this team, they will flood the airwaves with attacks on Tina and make it difficult for us to respond. We can't let that happen. We have to hit every single goal between now and Election Day to make sure Tina has the resources to win this race. We need her in the Senate fighting for lower prescription drug costs, speaking out for workers' rights, and standing up to any Republican efforts to take away our health care. **[That's why we're asking: Can you pitch in $5 or more before our FEC deadline at midnight tomorrow? We have less than 33 hours to hit our $50,000 grassroots goal and we're counting on grassroots progressives like you to step up.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be2d/c1f7015/6b89c7fb/1142ee2b/1081274282/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180629PM-ND") ** Thank you for pitching in, Team Smith **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be2d/c1f7015/6b89c7fb/1142ee2d/1081274282/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180629PM_em-ND&amount=25")**
---

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: How we're responding
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Tomorrow, I will face the most critical Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of my Senate reelection campaign yet.

We've been forced to reevaluate our entire budget since hearing that the Koch brothers are running ads against me! Read more below on why the Koch brothers are coming after me. Or, if you've heard enough:

**_[Help me reach our new fundraising goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Help+me+reach+our+new+fundraising+goal+b&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**The public outcry this month against family separation was swift, and legislation I cosponsored helped put pressure on the Trump administration to end the heinous practice.** I am continuing to work in the Senate to reunite families and ensure government agencies are keeping children safe. Our work is far from over, and without your help I won't be able to keep fighting for our values.

**Last month, the Senate passed a resolution to save net neutrality. I can 't overstate how big a victory this is.** Many said our bill wouldn't go anywhere, but it did. We showed Americans that the Senate can still come together and address the issues that matter to millions of Americans, consumers, and small businesses. But we still have work to do to keep our internet free and open, and I need your help to do it. So please consider donating today.

[DONATE $10 NOW >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7")
And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am looking to protect them. I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area -- a sacred place to all New Mexicans -- from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives -- and that has the Koch brothers scared.

**The Koch brothers just launched ads against me in New Mexico, and we 've been forced to change all our campaign plans in response. That means focusing more on grassroots advocacy, increasing our ad spending, and hiring more staff.**

****_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To respond to this latest news, our new budget goal is to raise an additional $50,000 before our Saturday Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline. This is my first Senate reelection race, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. Will you pitch in now and help us close our new budget gap before we must publicly report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7")_****

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ ****
****[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7")**** ****[Donate $27 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?express_lane=true&amount=27&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=13+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7")**** ******[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=14+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7")****** ****[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=15+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180629_3_7")**** Thank you for your support,
Martin

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, JUNE 29th**
|
---
**_A Note From Jeanie_**
Dear Derek,

What a week for Republicans! In Washington and here in New Hampshire.
The Supreme Court handed two major victories to Conservatives in the last few days. [First, the Justices upheld President Trump’s travel ban, confirming](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyKFeweSPGs4rPdzTy0m-2Fo9M5rZz6F-2FyYbL-2BtyjAoN5euCw-2B-2FHiTaDiFSP1LJbNYsgnaAUBDmuq0ijn-2F1gXXTVz3TTmRthIF2bc5ECc47Ccq4_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MF0WUuzPUS8vadJwHEW6r64rkN3aCQlHRVTXdL9qSpGj3-2FN7ivrG5Vi6L9CAYS3fYu5yMOuptNO-2FAoGCqwXJT-2FaErueBSJZBHGjPItP7J9ZmyFMoJ0pdxjfmwoMT1liRFZw6qT3HpUBMypGtRsNA9hwyzbb3-2BKXkSgVwMwJTrCfFWXfIEEGYGiZzd5RcaXI1zuNfcwqND-2B6Mqts0gdQlW12s7OXYKdwLhLTNLNylO4be2kenrL2eLabp0dProWHFp7xp7VF9Lz3RQp0m0X-2BNeMA-3D-3D)[ its constitutionality.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyKFeweSPGs4rPdzTy0m-2Fo9M5rZz6F-2FyYbL-2BtyjAoN5euCw-2B-2FHiTaDiFSP1LJbNYsgnaAUBDmuq0ijn-2F1gXXTVz3TTmRthIF2bc5ECc47Ccq4_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MF0WUuzPUS8vadJwHEW6r64rkN3aCQlHRVTXdL9qSpGj3-2FN7ivrG5Vi6L9CAYS3fYu5yMOuptNO-2FAoGCqwXJT-2FVnZHlsjWhkpt8xvKXi-2BCKdSoZcCx7VnxATO4EZLPv8-2BVwh4IWgkyr9gEiEMOktgXYvdGtW7cV-2FcFlulQxPHPWZx-2F353lr93NdMfrsS9-2FPAs11HYXgQitN0otT-2Bhe8pg9MWTZJSwAsD0GSJnSYyki4ztjKkFvqNtCgW8DjE0w2CZwuAMSy9Tz7rRkH83zoB0UQ-3D-3D) In a 5-to-4 vote, the court’s conservatives said that the President’s power to secure our country’s borders, delegated by Congress, was not undermined by his statements about the dangers Muslims pose to the United States.
[Then, days later, the Court delivered another 5-4 vote ruling that non-union employees cannot be forced to pay fees to public sector unions.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyIsaL-2BzTFBPfY7QpTRpVAoB0-2BHE7IpxwfMCK-2Fc2SZTwFryCHqV32Lmrfk0BLyFz7OZS12y6GytbC-2FH15x4aGPm6iuKpJNFKmGQrahQkMzOF2_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MF0WUuzPUS8vadJwHEW6r64rkN3aCQlHRVTXdL9qSpGj3-2FN7ivrG5Vi6L9CAYS3fYu5yMOuptNO-2FAoGCqwXJT-2FWgTVkd6FzjSNsu54kL2QfOHMMr59izAbKwT5cUWwT63GfJ5RIX9psq1dc1v40RV0aEMKV-2BSkyc3CP-2FEXeDTiHlCGD-2FCjcz-2BuNBKR6miuheP4MVGUsswEeGK5VfyBubyrI6S-2BHsTSdJJFsptJUk7ZzL-2Fz3XJZZhVpIozJUT083iEQ6gvv7Q6-2BrKH-2BwvOXlc7Pg-3D-3D)
And lastly, Justice Anthony Kennedy announced his retirement...giving President Trump the opportunity to appoint another conservative justice to the Supreme Court.
Here in New Hampshire, Governor Chris Sununu and our Republican leadership are pushing back aggressively on another Supreme Court ruling over the collection of sales taxes for internet transactions. Just yesterday, [Governor Sununu announced plans to call the legislature back for a special session to pass legislation in response to the court ruling.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyMg-2FeD1LzVyYKLXpHnrmvP2Q7Mh-2FjA59k2e5PlOwveb7E7KQnP2RV0RJqKOKipWirtaKvtrH3qEFRPLN51vZknk-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MF0WUuzPUS8vadJwHEW6r64rkN3aCQlHRVTXdL9qSpGj3-2FN7ivrG5Vi6L9CAYS3fYu5yMOuptNO-2FAoGCqwXJT-2Fbyi88HfJ2zCSDCOmmFQyi6TpQ-2FIhesrmQDQvGLQVzmB6JZFjMzf39-2BprKAQHVJ0U8pbKcysz4J0BwV2GKzja8-2B9s5Vh-2FwIhoX8cpAdBRlDtpnsdU8tnDJascDiUVOPRWN5WnITrIYlEbogyeKS5orKXno3jGiMF4PwE2wdo-2F-2BZukJZrm605PDKWIyZ-2Bg4fsQQ-3D-3D) “New Hampshire does not and will not ever impose a sales tax.,” said the Governor.
November 2018 will usher in a red wave – we have a message that is resonating with people and we have a record of achievement that is enviable not only here in New England, but across the country. New Hampshire will continue to move ahead in a positive direction only if we can deliver Republicans to the House and Senate to work with Governor Sununu; and send two Republicans to Congress. When Republicans work together, Republicans win.
On July 1 Wayne MacDonald will become the NHRSC Chair and I look forward to working with Wayne and other Republicans to assure victory in November 2018.

Sincerely,

Jeanie

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, JUNE 29th | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, What a week for Republicans! In Washington and here in New Hampshire. The Supreme Court handed two major victories to Conservatives in the last few days. In a 5-to-4 vote, the court’s conservatives said that the President’s power to secure our country’s borders, delegated by Congress, was not undermined by his statements about the dangers Muslims pose to the United States. And lastly, Justice Anthony Kennedy announced his retirement...giving President Trump the opportunity to appoint another conservative justice to the Supreme Court. Here in New Hampshire, Governor Chris Sununu and our Republican leadership are pushing back aggressively on another Supreme Court ruling over the collection of sales taxes for internet transactions. Just yesterday, “New Hampshire does not and will not ever impose a sales tax.,” said the Governor. November 2018 will usher in a red wave – we have a message that is resonating with people and we have a record of achievement that is enviable not only here in New England, but across the country. New Hampshire will continue to move ahead in a positive direction only if we can deliver Republicans to the House and Senate to work with Governor Sununu; and send two Republicans to Congress. When Republicans work together, Republicans win. On July 1 Wayne MacDonald will become the NHRSC Chair and I look forward to working with Wayne and other Republicans to assure victory in November 2018. Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. #FireTheIntern Digital Ad VESTA ROY APPLICATION DEADLINE SOON! The Vesta Roy Series is seeking a few good Republican women! The program is dedicated to educating and training Republican women to help them to position themselves politically. This year's graduating class is already busy running for office, helping with campaigns, and moving our state forward. Deadline for the next class is June 30. For more information, go to VestaRoy.com or contact Margaret Drye at 603-675-9159 or mdrye@madscape.com. PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS UPCOMING EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK Our great group of event attendees at our Educational Savings Account panel discussion on Wednesday night! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our Republican Spotlight this week is Rich Girard! Rich serves on the Manchester School Board and moderated our Educational Savings Accounts discussion on Wednesday night! Thank you for all you do, Rich! TWEETS** OF THE WEEK Tweet With Us! | | VIDEO OF SENATE PRESIDENT MORSE AT RED TOWN HALL RNC LAUNCHES "PAYCHECK PRESIDENT" WEBSITE House Speaker Gene Chandler Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Senate President Chuck Morse Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Executive Council Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Governor Chris Sununu Web - "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - Web - Facebook - Twitter - Chairman Jeanie Forrester "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - 10 Water Street, Concord, NH 03301 Phone: tel:6032259341 "tel:6032259341" | Email: mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" • • mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

subject: Upfront
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
| | | **[I'll be upfront -- this is a huge goal. We need $50,000 in the door before midnight on Saturday, and we're falling behind.](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+Irsquoll+be+upfront++this+is+a+huge+goal&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_NO_180628_1_5_resend&source=KS_EM_FR_NO_180628_1_5_resend&refcode=KS_EM_FR_NO_180628_1_5_resend")**

Coming up short is not an option.

My opponents, special-interest groups, and GOP super PACs will be going over what we report on this FEC filing with a fine-tooth comb.

They'll use it to determine our strength and -- especially if we look vulnerable -- how much they want to spend against us between now and November.

**_[This is serious. We must report the strongest numbers possible to show this campaign shouldn't be messed with. That means bringing in $50,000 before midnight on June 30. Can I count you in?](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+This+is+serious+We+must+report+the+stron&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_NO_180628_1_5_resend&source=KS_EM_FR_NO_180628_1_5_resend&refcode=KS_EM_FR_NO_180628_1_5_resend")_**

We already know groups backed by Mitch McConnell and Karl Rove have millions ready to dump into Arizona. Just two weeks ago, they spent half a million dollars on an ad buy for one of my opponents.

Any sign of weakness in my fundraising -- any at all -- and McConnell's groups are likely to begin blitzing Arizona with negative ads and hit pieces to try to knock us out.

That's why it's critical we hit our fundraising goal for this FEC deadline. We must show grassroots strength and the capacity to withstand any attacks.

Thanks for your continuing support.

Kyrsten

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Will you join the Canary Club?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Every day, I wear a pin depicting a yellow canary in a cage. And to me, it's much more than an accessory. Miners used to bring canaries into the mines in order to check for dangerous levels of gas. If the canary died, they knew to get out of the mine. Back then, there were no formal protections for workers. So they banded together to fight for the right to collectively bargain. Years ago, I went to a Workers' Memorial Day rally in Lorain, Ohio, and a steelworker from Local 1104 gave me the canary pin. I've worn it ever since. It reminds me not just of the workers' rights movement, but of every hardworking man and woman in America, the families they support, and how important it is for me and for this grassroots team to keep fighting for each of those families. The canary pin is an important symbol for me -- and to this campaign. So today, we're announcing the Team Sherrod Canary Club. Our organization runs on one $26 average online contribution at a time. If you [**match that by giving $26 today, you'll become a member of the Team Sherrod Canary Club.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff986/4462dc26/574beb61/2007abe9/3116128728/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180629z?refcode=sbe180629z_m&amount=26") We'll even send you a free bumper sticker as a thank you. | [](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff986/4462dc26/574beb61/2007abe9/3116128728/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180629z?refcode=sbe180629z_m&amount=26")
---
These next four months will not be easy. But as long as we face them together, we will come out ahead in November -- and we'll be able to continue fighting for hardworking families in Ohio and across the country.
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff986/4462dc26/574beb61/2007abe8/3116128728/VEsF/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
---
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff986/4462dc26/574beb61/2007abef/3116128728/VEsC/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/unsubscribe")

name: U.S. Senator Tim Kaine
subject: I'm asking you directly, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
We're smack in the middle of a critical election year, so if you've been waiting to get involved, now is the time. Chip in before tonight's deadline.
---
This November we have a chance to start fixing this mess and send a clear message to President Trump and Republicans in Congress that the majority of the American people do not support division, corruption, or immoral policies.

But we can only do it if millions of us come together to reclaim our democracy and get our country back on track. We're smack in the middle of a critical election year, so if you've been waiting to get involved, now is the time.

**It has never been more critical to stand with Democrats, Derek. Can I count on you to step up and make your first $3 contribution of 2018 before tonight's deadline?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182c4/409037272/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&source=em_20180630_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180630_tk_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182c5/409037272/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&source=em_20180630_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180630_tk_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182c2/409037272/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&source=em_20180630_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180630_tk_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182c3/409037272/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&source=em_20180630_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180630_tk_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182c0/409037272/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&source=em_20180630_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180630_tk_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182c1/409037272/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&source=em_20180630_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180630_tk_nd")
** You and I both know the best way to defend our values and protect our democracy for future generations is by building a strong Democratic Party capable of winning everywhere in 2018, 2019, and beyond.

As a former DNC chair, I can tell you exactly what that means: Putting more organizers on the ground, equipping a diverse field of candidates with all of the tools they need to take their message to voters, and building up our state parties -- in every state, not just battlegrounds.

If we can do that, we will win in November. But it will require us all working together to rebuild and strengthen the Democratic Party right now -- not in September or October.

**[I am asking you directly, Derek: Before tonight's deadline, can you make a $3 contribution? Your contribution will make a huge difference.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182ce/409037272/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+%0AI+am+asking+you+directlyCUSTOMDATASETsl&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&source=em_20180630_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180630_tk_nd")**

Thank you,

Tim Kaine
U.S. Senator, Virginia

P.S. I'll always have a special place in my heart for the DNC and people like you who support it. **[Before tonight's deadline, can you make a $3 contribution to build our party?](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182cf/409037272/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Before+tonights+deadline+can+you+make+a+&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&source=em_20180630_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180630_tk_nd")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182cc/409037272/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&source=em_20180630_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180630_tk_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182cd/409037272/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180630_tk_nd").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182ca/409037272/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180630_tk_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182cb/409037272/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&source=em_20180630_tk_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521106/4067b0a/66207888a/7fb182c8/409037272/VEsHBg/ "http://www.Democrats.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+wwwDemocratsorg&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tk_nd&source=em_20180630_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180630_tk_nd"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0d15daf1c8ffa82a11646e2ad18e61faca17bd9cc97b6c68e61f6df0be5648089019538b72b75e7c1490b3973e7a058a36eb5ec6050d59db

Nurturing a Small Business Boon

- The Washington Times

“As we mark six months since Mr. Trump signed the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act into law, we continue to see more Americans working,” Administrator Linda McMahon, head of the Small Business Administration, writes. “With more money in their pockets, Americans are spending again — and that’s good news for small businesses.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0d15daf1c8ffa82a0eb3f058dc5a7ac44d843844ce0ef411edd84307751b5401155a00880e32a805445075025e8d3b0b39535a50d732616c

Supreme Court Rules that President Trump's Travel Ban is Constitutional

- CNBC

The Supreme Court found this week that President Trump’s order on travel restrictions falls “squarely” within his executive authority, Tucker Higgins reports for CNBC. “The [order] is expressly premised on legitimate purposes: preventing entry of nationals who cannot be adequately vetted and inducing other nations to improve their practices,” Chief Justice John Roberts wrote.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0d15daf1c8ffa82aa43e11082b3eda408aad9c534308d70b95b8c39c9e5fd57b1abc4d8b79c276dc8c4fec87730cc5d296b32c2d84d09ac5

American Money Flowing Back into America

- Fox Business

“America’s CEOs are not wasting anytime in taking advantage of [President Trump’s] tax reform plan. Over $300 billion was repatriated to the U.S. in the first quarter, according to the Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) — the most on record,” Suzanne O’Halloran writes. “This is why many economists are boosting their GDP forecasts to between 3% and 4%.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f93962651b8267f6615095238bcac86998e595e7b838d28e9a38da2edd8805e91a6e403a85493ff7bf19a5d4a2d0fbca442b3ce37dc90f02

Foxconn Investment is Sign of More to Come

- Journal Times

“The groundbreaking on Foxconn’s $10-billion factory to produce state-of-the-art flat-panel displays in Mount Pleasant represents a milestone for America,” Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross writes. “It would never have happened without the promise of the Trump tax cuts and the President’s personal intervention.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f93962651b8267f63987a7d34cf25e7c99b303ca6bfffb12da60a0887f25edb973f3b61ad056dad736483e7bb54a441e5c7ee37bcaef00e9

Stand Tough on Trade: It’s a Start to Give Support to U.S. Manufacturing

- Pittsburgh Post-Gazette

The Pittsburgh Post-Gazette Editorial Board writes that President Trump “is forcing a re-examination of America’s trade policies, and making other countries consider the consequences of the trade war they have long waged upon us.” The editors remind readers that “America has been reflexively globalist and anti-protectionist for a long time now, and it has not worked. The Rust Belt has been impoverished.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f93962651b8267f69233b5e9e08ed4742f207eeae0ef7d54c41ee4819dcb4edfa72a65c05fa0a1f234d1f4539e5f90d573ff084af18a0ac9

President Trump's Approval Rating Rises Among Hispanics

- RealClearPolitics

In RealClearPolitics, Steve Cortes points out that the main driver of President Trump’s growing popularity is “a stunning 10 percent rise in Trump approval among Hispanics.” Cortes explains that “as President Trump pursues policies that drive growth and public safety –
such as tax cuts and cracking down on the MS-13 gang – no wonder his popularity rises apace among Latinos.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f93962651b8267f6255ad0a4ad024cccadc50d3a91b17038a5e5e6f6691962052991f7e304507850a6b2f6bd5442fe469ee5add8f67e7fb6
Democracy Requires Borders

- Washington Examiner

The Washington Examiner Editorial Board argues that the open border ideology of Democrats and left-wing commentators “is as dangerous as it is unpopular.” The editors paint a stark picture of that policy’s consequencs: “Theoretically, we could give up on borders, as some seem to want. But that would mean giving up on having a democratic society.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f93962651b8267f6ec88edad37b04626068915aae56845792afd597bbbceaeb00e1429a19435dee0bc855f09e1c3860c832ff48c679069c6
President Trump Will Protect US Farmers from China's Trade Retaliation

- USA Today

“President Donald Trump is standing up to China, which wrongly believes it can bully our farmers to get America to back away from defending our national interests,” Secretary of Agriculture Sonny Perdue writes in an op-ed for USA Today. “He will not allow U.S. agriculture to bear the brunt of China’s retaliatory tactics.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=957b0cfc2d55a2525246eac0000f64b34c1b68449c6a5ee17405f9d66fb374b605cde973041cd58b9ec841e11e949e850887cf0772d14adf
The Great Economic Comeback is Greatest for Millennials

- Washington Examiner

“Thanks to a robust economy, historically low unemployment, and the largest tax cut in history, our country is in the midst of a great American comeback, and millennials, perhaps more than any other generation, will reap the fruit of this great economic boon,” Ryan Fournier writes.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=957b0cfc2d55a25217276e0d693fa77890801e5f90618e6c5cf81f6317856edc7cdff172daf1a5fcb91de769a52f2cde7d3ce53b922b4802
Buying American Can Help Keep the Philly Shipyard Afloat

- The Philadelphia Inquirer

“President Trump’s commitment to a 355-ship United States Navy, together with this administration’s ongoing efforts to expand opportunities for United States industry, are creating the conditions for a more vibrant maritime industry and the rejuvenation of great maritime cities such as Philadelphia,” writes Peter Navarro, Director of the White House National Trade Council.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=957b0cfc2d55a252aae04e05f407f233f6cced7bf57d52581d70d2ef09ea115f9a2e70f8837eee2bb22bbafd4d5cb46670cef6d04473fc14
American Natural Gas Is Fueling the World’s Future

- Washington Examiner

Energy Secretary Rick Perry writes that “the United States is now producing enough natural gas and other fuels to be on the verge of energy independence. This positive development is untying the hands of our elected leadership, and enabling it to conduct foreign policy in a way that advances this Nation and its allies’ interests.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=957b0cfc2d55a252c1e8dccca92d97bede12758a1ea786ba8d20ca2eab54997c645d2a9b2c765f9c92fe9bdc7c6d71ae28b1ecab5dee4545
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=10591ab6ac2552e578eee384b74915a71ad2eeb53e9f05878d51d935679b4fd8d15e3b34dd1ef06d1d26218eaa4e6e0d8f8a33c7d4a54adc
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4386c85b8a630f93171c5df2f3839f5e23df142f459991d650193c519eb72c72a33868a3602780e89152debe379e2597a23bed0f6b9765656
Unsubscribe

name: U.S. Senator Kamala Harris
subject: I am counting on you, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
I have hope because I know that we will rise to the occasion. This year's elections are a huge opportunity for us to come together and fight for who we are and what we stand for.
---
Our country charted a great promise in 1776: We are all equal and should be treated as such.

This moment in time is challenging that very idea. The Supreme Court is at a tipping point with a woman's right to make her own health care decisions, marriage equality, and our fundamental civil rights on the line. And all the while, the Trump White House is advancing a radical anti-immigrant agenda and the Republican-led Congress is blatantly ignoring so many other pressing issues our country faces.

Yet I still have hope, because I know that we will rise to the occasion. This year's elections are an important opportunity for us to come together and fight for who we are and what we stand for. With only hours before tonight's critical deadline, it's time to roll up our sleeves.

**Can you chip in $3 before tonight's midnight deadline? Every donation will help elect Democrats nationwide this year and in the years ahead.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052110b/4067b0a/663201238/7fb19d8c/312246110/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kh-june-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180630_kh_v1s1&source=em_20180630_kh_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_kh_v1s1")

** Each and every day I wake up to fight for our ideals, Derek. Because I know that no one should live in fear that health care providers will deceive them or hospital bills will leave them bankrupt. No one should worry that they won't be allowed into this country because of their religion, or that their children will be ripped from their arms or shot in the street. And I know you agree.

It's time to elect Democrats who will take a stand against the conservative majority on the Supreme Court, pass comprehensive immigration legislation, reform our criminal justice system, and ensure that every American has access to good, affordable health care. That all starts with tonight's deadline.

**[I am counting on you, Derek. Chip in $3 before tonight's deadline to help elect Democrats nationwide.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052110b/4067b0a/663201238/7fb19d96/312246110/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kh-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+I+am+counting+on+youCUSTOMDATASETslugwhi&utm_campaign=em_20180630_kh_v1s1&source=em_20180630_kh_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_kh_v1s1")**

The Democratic Party is so lucky to have supporters like you in its corner.

Thanks for all you do,

Kamala Harris
U.S. Senator, California

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. clean_body: I have hope because I know that we will rise to the occasion. This year's elections are a huge opportunity for us to come together and fight for who we are and what we stand for. Our country charted a great promise in 1776: We are all equal and should be treated as such. This moment in time is challenging that very idea. The Supreme Court is at a tipping point with a woman's right to make her own health care decisions, marriage equality, and our fundamental civil rights on the line. And all the while, the Trump White House is advancing a radical anti-immigrant agenda and the Republican-led Congress is blatantly ignoring so many other pressing issues our country faces. Yet I still have hope, because I know that we will rise to the occasion. This year's elections are an important opportunity for us to come together and fight for who we are and what we stand for. name: Mayor Pete Buttigieg
subject: I'm asking you, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-ooaII2WrH-v3XMLH-nimFfzsxpa_FAuEE6q7r0ME-8=/bPB_h-sAspaAOqZAFRzgLmj-AZtXTd39eT0Qj1xqL-4=?refcode=em180630am)

Friend,

This might be the most important political moment in our lifetime -- and so much of the next chapter in the American story will be written in the places where you and I come from.

Every day he is in office, Donald Trump yanks out threads from the very fabric of what it means to be an American. One thread at a time, he is unraveling our republic. And he'll keep pulling until the American dream is a tangled mess of yarn in his hands.

But this election isn't just about Donald Trump. It's about Democrats running to support and protect people going about their everyday lives.

[**In Congress, Mel Hall will work every day to create opportunity for Hoosiers -- but he can 't do it without our support. That's why I'm asking, team: will you contribute {{LargestContributionAmount,DefaultTo=5} to Mel's campaign before tonight's big FEC fundraising deadline?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-ooaII2WrH-v3XMLH-nimFfzsxpa_FAuEE6q7r0ME-8=/bPB_h-sAspaAOqZAFRzgLmj-AZtXTd39eT0Qj1xqL-4=?refcode=em180630am)

Whatever divides us, the most important things bring us together. Taking care of the people we love, having a shot at building a better life. Coming home safe.

We need leaders who will guide us on a better path -- away from the politics of resentment, the politics of fear, and the politics of celebrity, and back to the politics of the everyday. We need leaders who will stand up for a better America.

**Mel Hall is one of those leaders, and I hope I can count on you to support him as we work toward real representation and change in Washington. Contribute before tonight 's deadline to elect Mel.**

_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/-ooaII2WrH-v3XMLH-nimFfzsxpa_FAuEE6q7r0ME-8=/bPB_h-sAspaAOqZAFRzgLmj-AZtXTd39eT0Qj1xqL-4=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em180630am)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/-ooaII2WrH-v3XMLH-nimFfzsxpa_FAuEE6q7r0ME-8=/bPB_h-sAspaAOqZAFRzgLmj-AZtXTd39eT0Qj1xqL-4=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em180630am)

[Express Donate: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/-ooaII2WrH-v3XMLH-nimFfzsxpa_FAuEE6q7r0ME-8=/bPB_h-sAspaAOqZAFRzgLmj-AZtXTd39eT0Qj1xqL-4=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=em180630am)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/-ooaII2WrH-v3XMLH-nimFfzsxpa_FAuEE6q7r0ME-8=/bPB_h-sAspaAOqZAFRzgLmj-AZtXTd39eT0Qj1xqL-4=?refcode=em180630am)

Thank you,

Pete

name: Laney A. (Digital Director)
subject: Minnesota is a "state to watch"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Amy wrote you on Wednesday and said, "This is a time for action." She's right -- now more than ever, we need people to stand up and make their voices heard.

And it's especially important that you make your voice heard in our state this year. Minnesota will play a critical role in 2018 -- CNN called it "ground zero," and now Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ is calling it a "state to watch."

This year Minnesotans decide who serves in both U.S. Senate seats, all the seats in the U.S. House and the Minnesota House -- and elect a new governor, too! The results will determine the fate of the issues we care about and the direction of our state and country -- _and President Trump only lost Minnesota by two points._

So we need people like you working to make sure that Minnesotans reelect Amy this fall. **Will you make a contribution to help Amy stay in the Senate?**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

already to help us hit our goal before tonight’s critical FEC

name: Mike Braun
subject: Deadline Tomorrow
body:
Peter,

I wanted to take a minute away from the campaign trail to reach out to you about our critical campaign finance deadline.

We have an urgent need to continue running our ads through the summer, and our end of the quarter fundraising period ends tomorrow. I need your help with meeting our goal to ensure that Hoosiers continue hearing our vision to drain the Washington Swamp.

Visit our website to chip in $25 before the deadline hits tomorrow and let’s retire Sleepin’ Joe --> www.mikebraunforindiana.com/donate/

Mike

If you are no longer interested you can unsubscribe instantly:

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Peter --
Governor Bredesen wanted me to let you know that you’re only going to get one more email after this one about our End-of-Quarter deadline tonight. He knows that this isn’t our favorite part of the campaign, and that it isn’t yours either.
But we also know that the grassroots support we get from these emails is critical to keeping our campaign running the right way, especially for critical deadlines like tonight’s. [**Your donations of $10 or more are making a big impact, and we really do appreciate your help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1535112/8259809/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjkxMzQ3Ni03YTdjLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tfFnbMqEqbPLZZy8c6lnw7AZ0kR9qPkDUJRcAGaOCSQ=&refcode=em180629-eoq5-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=true)
Our campaign is different than other campaigns making these fundraising requests this weekend. And we’re definitely not like our opponent’s campaign.
Governor Bredesen’s message isn’t based on talking points drawn up by some group of Washington consultants with no connection in Tennessee. And we’re not relying on out-of-state special interests or mega-donors.
**This campaign is about you.**
Our campaign is focused on bringing people of all backgrounds together to get things done for Tennessee. And that means we’re relying on support from grassroots donors just like you to get our message to voters the right way — by knocking doors, hitting the phones, and campaigning in every corner of the state.
[**Can we count on your help to keep it up? By chipping in $10 or whatever you can ahead of tonight’s deadline, you’re making it possible for us to run a different kind of campaign — one truly focused on Tennessee.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1535113/8259810/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjkxMzQ3Ni03YTdjLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tfFnbMqEqbPLZZy8c6lnw7AZ0kR9qPkDUJRcAGaOCSQ=&refcode=em180629-eoq5-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1535114/8259811/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjkxMzQ3Ni03YTdjLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tfFnbMqEqbPLZZy8c6lnw7AZ0kR9qPkDUJRcAGaOCSQ=&refcode=em180629-eoq5-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=true)**
I’m glad you have our back,
—Bob
Bob Corney
Campaign Manager
Bredesen for Senate

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61d0/51dbcc2a/1b1c549c/3a4d79e/470817157/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Today is our _last day_ to get donations for Bob's second quarter FEC report, team. Here's why that's important:

Big Republican spenders from Mitch McConnell to the Koch brothers are going to use the numbers on our report -- how much Bob raised and how many donations he received -- to decide how much money to spend in Pennsylvania this year. If we don't demonstrate that Bob has a strong base of support, they will smell blood in the water and go all-in to try to flip this seat.

**_[Make a donation of any amount -- just $5 will go a long way -- to show the GOP that you have Bob's back.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180630_fr1_v1f2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_** [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180630_fr1_v1f2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") Protecting Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat has NEVER been more important. Now that there's a Supreme Court vacancy, President Trump is going to try to give a far-right, corporate ideologue a lifetime appointment to the highest court in the land. Republicans are extremely invested in making that happen, so they're more motivated than ever to flip Democratic Senate seats to ensure a smooth nomination process.

Bob has fought against President Trump's unqualified, dangerous nominees with both fists up, and we need to protect his voice in this fight. It's going to get ugly and expensive, but the outcome will have ripple effects for generations, so we have to be 100% dedicated to winning this one.

**Bob is fighting for us and for our values, and now it's time to fight for him. Make a donation before midnight tonight.** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. name: Ralph Northam
subject: My friend, Abigail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

I am so excited to be the first to share with you my endorsement of Abigail Spanberger for Virginia's 7th Congressional District.

I am proud to offer my support because over the past 11 months, I have watched her work tirelessly to meet with voters, understand the issues impacting Virginia families, and advocate for solutions that put people before politics. We need thoughtful, dedicated individuals in Congress like Abigail who are focused on delivering results and who are willing to **stand up against policies and rhetoric that take us****backwards****.**

Her service to our country as a CIA officer and her dedication to our community as a Girl Scout Leader exemplifies the honor, integrity, and selflessness that central **Virginians deserve in their next representative.** She will bring these values to Congress, and I look forward to working with her to deliver results for Virginia families.

But we still have a tough race ahead of us, and Abigail and her team will need all of our help to win in November. I ask that you consider supporting her efforts. **[Will you make a contribution to ensure they have a strong foundation heading into the fall?](https://act.myngp.com/el/RYqlDuUGm2Dc-MssfMdeTlUb9OQbPRoruawYn9Ufjyk=/KVWs0O-6OsA1wiplHUx2_GCojSLcjMPfVKzXGyBpnxk=?refcode=northam63018)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/RYqlDuUGm2Dc-MssfMdeTlUb9OQbPRoruawYn9Ufjyk=/KVWs0O-6OsA1wiplHUx2_GCojSLcjMPfVKzXGyBpnxk=?refcode=northam63018)
Take care,

Ralph Northam

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

name: Peter
subject: give me a minute to explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Here's how this always plays out: most people will start paying attention to what's at stake a couple weeks before Election Day, and that's when everyone wants to chip in. |
---

| | Hey Peter,

Yahoo just ran this headline: _"Joe Donnelly shows up and does his job. But is that enough to win in the age of Trump?"_

In short, the answer is no. Joe doing his job (and doing it well) might not be enough on its own for him -- or any Democrat -- to win in 2018.

That'll only be a success if we have the money to spread the message of his work and fund our campaign plan to re-elect Indiana's Democratic senator. And we need it now. **[Can you rush a contribution before today's end-of-quarter deadline? Remember, all donations are double matched before the deadline.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e13/7377f838/3d065616/51f9ca95/1656866176/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq-doublematch?refcode=20180630.1&amount=25")**

We need to show our strength on the first finance report of the general election, and NOW is the time to give if you want to set us up to beat Republican Rep. subject: hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I want to take a second to explain why it's so important to us that we hit our goal before the deadline.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a4e/2fde7c66/46e2772a/15682db9/3459049915/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180626-cooper-juneeoq18?gpsid=8_43_1752&refcode=em18_180630_eoq4_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180630_eoq4_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
I know you're probably getting flooded with emails before tonight's big deadline, friend,

I want to take a second to explain why it's so important to us that we hit our goal before the deadline.

We all know what's been going on in the legislature the last few years. Republican leaders have been working to take our state backward and standing in the way of progress.

These past few weeks, though, they've taken it to another level. Instead of spending time trying to improve our schools or invest in education, they proposed changes to our state constitution that will make it harder for people to vote and roll back fundamental checks and balances in our state.

**Their priorities are all wrong for North Carolina -- and it's doing real damage. If we can Break the Majority, we can make more real progress in this state. clean_body: I want to take a second to explain why it's so important to us that we hit our goal before the deadline. | "" I know you're probably getting flooded with emails before tonight's big deadline, friend, I want to take a second to explain why it's so important to us that we hit our goal before the deadline. We all know what's been going on in the legislature the last few years. Republican leaders have been working to take our state backward and standing in the way of progress. These past few weeks, though, they've taken it to another level. Instead of spending time trying to improve our schools or invest in education, they proposed changes to our state constitution that will make it harder for people to vote and roll back fundamental checks and balances in our state. Their priorities are all wrong for North Carolina -- and it's doing real damage. If we can Break the Majority, we can make more real progress in this state. We're still over $10,000 from our goal before tonight's deadline and I'm counting on you to chip in to help us get there: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" We are in a battle for the heart and soul of North Carolina. If we're successful in November, we will make a real difference in North Carolina's future. For the first time in our state's history, we have recruited Democratic candidates for all 170 seats in our legislature. Even better -- 77 of them are women. "+" Thanks for all you continue to do for our state, Roy | "" * Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

name: Tina Smith
subject: I hope you will take a couple minutes to read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I feel so grateful to have you all in this fight with me.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be2f/c1f7015/6b91fa6e/11421074/687719472/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq-tina?refcode=rtw_20180630AM-logo") Friend, I know you've been getting a lot of emails from me and my team leading up to tonight's FEC deadline, but I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why we do it. Campaigns are funded in a number of ways: fundraisers, calling potential donors, friends asking friends, and yes, grassroots fundraising online. Now each of these plays an important part of how we build our team and plan a budget, but this part -- the online grassroots fundraising part -- is the most important to me. It's not just because it means we can spend less time calling donors and more time doing the work we need to do to fight for our values, but because I know that most of this team who gives $5, $10, or $25 is making a sacrifice to do so. You don't have money set aside in your budget for making contributions to candidates, but you do it because you understand how important it is. And as I took a look at who has already donated this week like Karen from Baudette who is retired, Aaron an electrician from Minneapolis, or Martha a physician in Rochester, my heart fills with gratitude and it makes me more determined than ever to keep fighting. Because it's been a long week. We've seen some disheartening decisions at the Supreme Court upholding Trump's Muslim ban, attacking our union family, and now Justice Kennedy has retired, leaving the possibility of Trump appointing another conservative Justice to the Supreme Court. And it's easy to become discouraged by the news or jaded with special interests, super PACs, and the billionaires who can just drop millions of dollars into any race they want. **But Karen, Aaron, Martha, and everyone on this team reminds me every day that we can do anything and take on anyone when we do it together.** They are not giving up, they are doing everything they can so that all those donations can come together to do something really special. Win this race, turn the Senate blue, take a stand for our values against Trump, and send the message across the country that progressives are willing to fight. I do not say lightly that this feels like one of the most important elections in our lifetime. Our values as progressives and as Americans feel like they are under attack every day. And it can't be enough just to win anymore, we have to send a message with this victory. Organize everywhere, talk to every voter, because this is just too important to treat this like any other election. Health care, the Supreme Court, workers rights -- everything is at stake. **[Our deadline is in just a couple hours, so I hope you'll make a donation here and give everything you can so we can organize everywhere, talk to every voter, and win this election in November.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be2f/c1f7015/6b91fa6e/11421075/687719472/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq-tina?refcode=rtw_20180630AM")** You and everyone on this team are a remarkable, hardworking, dedicated group, and I feel so grateful to have you all doing this with me. You are the best, and I cannot imagine doing any of this campaign without you. Tina **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be2f/c1f7015/6b91fa6e/11421076/687719472/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq-tina?refcode=rtw_20180630AM&amount=25")**
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be2f/c1f7015/6b91fa6e/11421077/687719472/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---
All content (C) 2018 Tina Smith for Minnesota, All Rights Reserved
PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
[Privacy Policy](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be2f/c1f7015/6b91fa6e/11421048/687719472/VEsD/ "https://tinaforminnesota.com/privacy.html")

name: Tom Perez
subject: Before midnight tonight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
When Donald Trump and his Republican Party take cruelty and make it policy, we have to fight back.
---
Today I am marching in Washington, D.C. to protest the atrocity that is going on at our nation's southern border. When Donald Trump and his Republican Party take cruelty and make it policy, we have to fight back.

Now's not the time to despair about what Trump and the GOP are doing to our country. We must stand together and roll up our sleeves because this November, Democrats have a chance to achieve sweeping victories in states, cities, and towns across the country. We have a chance to start fixing our country and taking back our government at every level.

But we can't wait until two weeks before Election Day to invest in our candidates across the country. Changing the direction of our country starts right now -- before tonight's FEC fundraising deadline.

**Make a $3 donation before midnight tonight if you're ready to elect Democrats nationwide.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052112e/4067b0a/661234d3a/7fb070a8/1755200192/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_tp_v1s1")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052112e/4067b0a/661234d3a/7fb070a9/1755200192/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_tp_v1s1")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052112e/4067b0a/661234d3a/7fb070b6/1755200192/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_tp_v1s1")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052112e/4067b0a/661234d3a/7fb070b7/1755200192/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_tp_v1s1")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052112e/4067b0a/661234d3a/7fb070b4/1755200192/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_tp_v1s1")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052112e/4067b0a/661234d3a/7fb070b5/1755200192/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_tp_v1s1")
** Let me tell you something about why these FEC deadlines matter. It's not just about the Democratic Party hitting fundraising goals. It's about the number of people who are ready to step up and help change course in our country.

Electing Democrats at all levels of government is the best way to fight back against the GOP's harmful agenda -- and taking back the Senate in November will stop Trump from lining the Supreme Court and the rest of our federal judiciary with even more ultra-conservative judges. It's gonna take a lot of work, Derek. But I know we can do it -- starting with standing together before tonight's deadline.

**[Chip in $3 before midnight to give Democrats the resources to organize and win nationwide.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052112e/4067b0a/661234d3a/7fb070b2/1755200192/VEsFBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+Chip+in++if+consinConsGroup30168+CUSTOMD&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_tp_v1s1")**

Thanks for your support during this critical deadline.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. So much has happened in our country this week, and a majority of it was not good. November's elections are our chance to turn it around -- and if we want to win, we have to hit our fundraising goal now. **[Before midnight tonight, chip in $3 to help elect Democrats.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052112e/4067b0a/661234d3a/7fb070b3/1755200192/VEsFBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=33+-++if+consinConsGroup29422+Youve+been+ther&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_tp_v1s1")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052112e/4067b0a/661234d3a/7fb070b0/1755200192/VEsFAQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_tp_v1s1").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052112e/4067b0a/661234d3a/7fb070b1/1755200192/VEsFAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_tp_v1s1").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052112e/4067b0a/661234d3a/7fb070be/1755200192/VEsFAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=36+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180630_tp_v1s1"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052112e/4067b0a/661234d3a/7fb070bf/1755200192/VEsFAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=37+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180630_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180630_tp_v1s1"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Congressman Bruce Westerman
subject: Midnight Deadline!
body:
| | [](http://www.brucewesterman.com/?e=87de312c4219248fa3631a1188a4b4f4&utm_source=westerman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=midnight_june_30&n=1)
---
Friend -- Midnight marks tonight's fundraising deadline, and I want to make sure we have done everything we can to reach our supporters encouraging them to support our important campaign.[
](https://www.brucewesterman.com/donate?e=87de312c4219248fa3631a1188a4b4f4&utm_source=westerman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=midnight_june_30&n=2) We've come a long way because of your support, but today is another critical day for us. We need your help to ensure our campaign [has the resources](https://www.brucewesterman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fbrucewesterman.com%2Fdonate&e=87de312c4219248fa3631a1188a4b4f4&utm_source=westerman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=midnight_june_30&n=3) to win and continue the fight for Less Hassle and More Freedom.[
](https://www.brucewesterman.com/donate?e=87de312c4219248fa3631a1188a4b4f4&utm_source=westerman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=midnight_june_30&n=4) We have a goal of 15 more online donations before midnight. Will you be one of those by making a quick visit to[ BruceWesterman.com/donate](https://www.brucewesterman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fbrucewesterman.com%2Fdonate&e=87de312c4219248fa3631a1188a4b4f4&utm_source=westerman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=midnight_june_30&n=5) right now?[
](https://www.brucewesterman.com/donate?e=87de312c4219248fa3631a1188a4b4f4&utm_source=westerman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=midnight_june_30&n=6) Your partnership is critical to our success and, I assure you, is not taken for granted. Please[ chip in](https://www.brucewesterman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fbrucewesterman.com%2Fdonate&e=87de312c4219248fa3631a1188a4b4f4&utm_source=westerman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=midnight_june_30&n=7) today.[](https://www.brucewesterman.com/donate?e=87de312c4219248fa3631a1188a4b4f4&utm_source=westerman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=midnight_june_30&n=8) Congressman Bruce Westerman http://www.brucewesterman.com

body:

---
Friend -- At the end of the day, we are closing our books on this fiscal quarter! We are getting so close to meeting our budgetary projections, but to get there **we need to close a $9,525 fundraising gap**. While Richard has been going around the state soliciting opinions and questions from voters like you, our opponent has been spending millions of Super PAC dollars on nonstop television ads. **Richard Painter wants to earn your vote; our opponent wants to buy it.** Every contribution that we get helps us in our fight. **We want to close our books today strong and send the message that people powered, grassroots campaigns can win!** **Can you contribute $5, $10, $27 or $100?** [](https://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=last_day_fundraiser&n=2) We can do this, Painter For Minnesota

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Please read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | There's no denying what this means, you know. A new poll published in the _Sun-Sentinel_ shows President Trump's approval on the rise in Florida. Combine that with his attacks against me on Twitter, and that could equal a tough few months ahead of us. I need your help to push back against whatever attacks and smears come our way. [**_Can you help by giving $5, $10, or whatever you can toward our $30,000 FEC goal?_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f02/622b7b5b/1bbc03a3/307b9e9c/1298488983/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180630?refcode=dwse180630_m&recurring=true&amount=5") The truth is President Trump does not like me because the truth hurts. The truth is that he's coming after me because I'm an outspoken opponent of his agenda. And his tweets will not silence me. _[**When he and his allies in Congress threaten Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security, I fight back.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f02/622b7b5b/1bbc03a3/307b9e9c/1298488983/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180630?refcode=dwse180630_m&recurring=true&amount=5")_ I protect seniors, the disabled, retirees, and all the Florida families that rely on those safety nets for security and prosperity. _[**When Trump and his allies try to repeal access to affordable health care, which as you know happens a lot, I fight back.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f02/622b7b5b/1bbc03a3/307b9e9c/1298488983/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180630?refcode=dwse180630_m&recurring=true&amount=5")_ No one should have to worry that one illness or accident will drive their family into bankruptcy. _[**When Trump and his allies try to defund Planned Parenthood and women's health clinics, I fight back.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f02/622b7b5b/1bbc03a3/307b9e9c/1298488983/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180630?refcode=dwse180630_m&recurring=true&amount=5")_ Women deserve access to whatever reproductive care they, their families, and their doctors decide they need. Those are just some of the things I believe in -- and some of the things we fight for together on Team DWS. **When Trump attacks me, he's attacking you, too.** I fight back on behalf of Florida families. It's my job. But in order to succeed in blocking Trump's dangerous agenda, I need you on my side. [**_So let's keep fighting back together by hitting this $30,000 FEC goal. Give what you can, whatever amount that is._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f02/622b7b5b/1bbc03a3/307b9e9c/1298488983/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180630?refcode=dwse180630_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you for your help today. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f02/622b7b5b/1bbc03a3/307b9e9f/1298488983/VEsA/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

subject: FWD: [Senate] Protect these 10 seats + flip these 2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c41c2/24c69fd9/18f2796dc/18837e6b/560767744/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER79N_digital_email_20180630_EOQBasicSenateKick_inact&source=WQEFER79N_digital_email_20180630_EOQBasicSenateKick_inact")

Peter,

Today is the last day of the quarter!

That means today is our last chance to reach our $400,000 End-of-Quarter goal -- our largest yet this cycle.

Reaching that goal is essential to helping flip the Senate this year by re-electing our 10 sitting Senate champions and adding two red-to-blue challengers to their ranks.

And after a week of disastrous Supreme Court decisions, it's as clear as ever that _elections. matter._

**Donate $3 to help reach our $400,000 End-of-Quarter goal by midnight tonight, so we can elect pro-choice Democratic women to flip the Senate:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-June-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c41c2/24c69fd9/18f2796dc/18837e64/560767744/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180626_email_JuneEOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachJuneGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFER79N_digital_email_20180630_EOQBasicSenateKick_inact&source=WQEFER79N_digital_email_20180630_EOQBasicSenateKick_inact")**

Thanks,

Christina Reynolds
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

name: Emma Carl
subject: Back on the Doors!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

Today, we're kicking off our first door knocking event since Abigail won the Democratic primary, and we're fired up!

We have a great group of volunteers ready to brave the heat and talk with voters about why **Abigail is the best choice for the 7th District.**

This weekend also marks the end of quarter fundraising deadline, and we're only $6,729 short of meeting our goal. But how many doors we knock over the next four months **relies completely on your support.**

By hitting our goal, we'll be able to invest in the literature, clipboards, and other crucial resources (like cold water and sunblock!) we need to continue knocking doors, engaging voters, and spreading the word about Abigail's grassroots campaign throughout the summer.

While our team is out hitting the doors, will you [**support our volunteers with a contribution?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qR5ujsbJNqy90BECmZFUNONCEEEtFH7wO_HBDBbDVzA=/AvRlqoYcwqOhioP4nWmBp87cu5I_iPIN8mpzedfDgRI=?refcode=emma63018) Your donation is essential to our continued success, and I can't wait to share your support with Abigail.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qR5ujsbJNqy90BECmZFUNONCEEEtFH7wO_HBDBbDVzA=/AvRlqoYcwqOhioP4nWmBp87cu5I_iPIN8mpzedfDgRI=?refcode=emma63018)
Sincerely,

-Emma Carl
_Finance Director,__Spanberger for Congress_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qR5ujsbJNqy90BECmZFUNONCEEEtFH7wO_HBDBbDVzA=/1_NFrR5_nU-hpLHVzOc__haYurVBKXVIh358bydXNOk=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/qR5ujsbJNqy90BECmZFUNONCEEEtFH7wO_HBDBbDVzA=/jR0EvtUOZZu4eIBVEcEg3f1zpy-N1LGcxN68T-KqDMI=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/qR5ujsbJNqy90BECmZFUNONCEEEtFH7wO_HBDBbDVzA=/dVX6xqLlswa6FijQSKQoph6atm-3tckWwnLEpooCOUQ=).

name: Austin Petersen
subject: need your help Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, I have to admit that I am a little nervous about the FEC campaign finance report. The deadline to report how much our campaign has raised is at midnight. I am sitting down to make phone calls all day long so our campaign is well funded to take down Josh Hawley in July and August. We don’t have much time left. We need to make these last days count! Friend, I am going to bring the hammer down on him. Every Missouri GOP voter is going know that Hawley is a fake conservative and that I am the best candidate to defeat Claire McCaskill in the general election. But I am specifically asking for your help today. Friend, this is the most important fundraising deadline of the campaign. I am counting on your help reach our goal tonight. I need 140 more people to reach 1,500 online donors by the end of the day. Can you donate? This is an historic opportunity to advance liberty. But I need your help. Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=f5dd1de38eac4718a081839f2c944b46&_e=h6e94RL5Gy-Ceu0iCcPjtTbafyC1Cfcn1BCVB5XOF7ZEJ-Ad-98SwvXJG7OZhiFdcLlHV7JIMJJKLMuLHLM_CQF_4VaDqbbJZN_Je0j4jK4EK12Z9LVspg4Uz9RhGTkXlkDMUEDwAC_5e8PSSSJx5WGI7wH7Kkk1A6OCu6cIi6p7minhCvhkcQ2JenM5PU6vkaen3_2B0p7GP35t68tIZzYji7oSR9UcgyxLkHalrUTmlAyjfeWLkCG8nb6fAC_QU5T_pxAJ_2ZuIig7bXkQPDTh-PVgGi5O7zt9EaGO_MrBpSM_6zlCR8tkD-4fIR7ExWEAjJlReg1xCkNYUXJHFNInR_dkFuSk5tinx-GdX7BcgPpPBmg2W-H6GdMFz5v6) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=f5dd1de38eac4718a081839f2c944b46&_e=h6e94RL5Gy-Ceu0iCcPjtTbafyC1Cfcn1BCVB5XOF7YJdTcXGO_mdCXSU3xH35R8BIrToXyrD5-l086UWtUCvokIRTz0BoHBODrASQNmUfgOr3im5QHwnNoC7w92QvV3_x-pFTCm1uhlQwajuD69P-rxMXEwwwOe6-WtJRYUGUdwgBm0nIRCvk5pkPBZdwqPhNkOX1E58Bu_6jJfS0ZhGZJawzNun3L9fQ-y6vd-8M1SnmPar35q4NWvJmBsRm9eQthI2NhTLZ2ZYxvbE0axOxqmodqfL_bb4X7yXEJPRCpio8Gh3QC6OqtR0O2ITuGK1s0e0UvrRyUtS9zzQBAhezA6aZNVSNVqCIXKSFVtYRqndzwxi1EEaAa7ddLYbRzJ) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington.
