clean_body: I just checked in on our END OF QUARTER goals and it looks like we still have $6,211 left to go! Friend, I just checked in on our END OF QUARTER goals and it looks like we still have $6,211 left to go! ** I can’t stress enough how important this deadline is and we MUST reach our goals to succeed. To make it easier for you, one of our generous donors has stepped up and agreed to match every donation we get before midnight tonight! That means a gift of $50, is really $100. If you give $100, it's really $200, etc. I know we can fight that blue wave and deliver the Wisconsin Way to Washington. But we have to work together now. I’m counting on you, Leah \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, we’re just 2 days away from one of the biggest tests our campaign has faced. It’s our first END OF QUARTER fundraising deadline since we won the Republican Party of Wisconsin endorsement at last month’s convention, and as of this email, we are just short of reaching our goal. We have $12,509 left to go. I'm just going to be honest with you. Democrats are outraising AND outspending us! According to recent reports in Politico, Democrats have spent over $7 million to re-elect Senator Baldwin and make Wisconsin a blue state again. They are spending money to buy this election and silence YOUR opinion! We HAVE to fight back! Please, friend, let’s show them we’re serious. Let’s exceed every expectation and close out this quarter with a huge bang. If you can chip in today, even just $25, it would be a big help in bringing our fight straight to Washington: Thank you, friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Amanda Eubanks
subject: Just hours away...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | I know it's a Saturday morning, but we wouldn't be sending this email if we didn't have to. I'll keep this short -- you already know how hard Kathy is fighting for you and the issues you care about. The first FEC deadline of the general election is tonight at midnight and we're still behind our quarterly goal. [**If you can, please contribute to help us reach $50,000 by the midnight deadline.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427810/e3b7d3/5c97b416/2555e112/2857665436/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180630am?refcode=kme180630am_m") We've come a long way in North Carolina's 13th District. We've knocked on doors and made phone calls. We've handed out signs and signed up volunteers. Through hard work and determination, we've taken this race from a long-shot to one of the most competitive House races in the country. **Kathy can win this thing.** She can put an end to Congressman Ted Budd's tenure of representing the special interests and finally give the families of this district the fighter they deserve. But she can't do it without our help. We hit goals. We build resources. We win. That's how this goes. **With only four months left before Election Day, we cannot miss our goal now.** [**Midnight is about 13 hours from right now. That's all the time we've got to raise the $7,896 left between us and our goal. Rush in your contribution now.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427810/e3b7d3/5c97b416/2555e112/2857665436/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180630am?refcode=kme180630am_m") Thank you for your support. Amanda Eubanks
Finance Director
Kathy Manning for Congress | | _Kathy Manning is a proud advocate for the families of North Carolina. To her, the cause of making health care more affordable and accessible isn't political -- it's personal. She relies on your contributions to be elected._ | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427810/e3b7d3/5c97b416/2555e112/2857665436/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180630am?refcode=kme180630am_m")

name: Martin Sheen
subject: what you can do to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
The West Wing ended years ago now, but I still get a lot of questions about my character, President Bartlet. What would he think of this moment in our politics?
Friend, _The West Wing_ ended years ago now, but I still get a lot of questions about my character, President Bartlet. _What would he think of this moment in our politics?_ What WOULD he think? **Well, he 'd be pretty upset to see the mess Republicans are making in Congress and their attacks on our health care. But he'd be determined to do something about it too.** And there's something you can do today to fight back. You [**can support**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.06.29_b3_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Tom O'Halleran, a public servant and independent voice who is doing the right thing, fighting for Arizona families every day in Washington. [**Would you join me in supporting Tom 's re-election campaign before his big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline? He needs to raise another $2,483 by tonight at midnight, so every dollar counts.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.06.29_b3_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") President Bartlet believed firmly in the ability of our government to work for everyday Americans. And even though some extreme Republican voices are making a mess of things, independent voices like Tom are proving President Bartlet's belief in the power of government. [**With your help, Tom will keep fighting for Arizona families -- and he 'll win re-election this fall. Please chip in to help Tom before his big deadline at midnight.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.06.29_b3_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Martin Sheen | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.06.29_b3_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. Well, he 'd be pretty upset to see the mess Republicans are making in Congress and their attacks on our health care. But he'd be determined to do something about it too. And there's something you can do today to fight back. You "=" Tom O'Halleran, a public servant and independent voice who is doing the right thing, fighting for Arizona families every day in Washington. "=" President Bartlet believed firmly in the ability of our government to work for everyday Americans. And even though some extreme Republican voices are making a mess of things, independent voices like Tom are proving President Bartlet's belief in the power of government. "=" Thanks, Martin Sheen | ** "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "=". ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

name: Michael Soliman, MenendezForNJ.com
subject: Friend, it is terrifying to think of what could happen next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
**" Justice Kennedy, the pivotal swing vote on the Supreme Court, announces retirement"
_Washington Post,_ 6/27/18** Friend,

Bob Hugin called Neil Gorsuch "an excellent choice" and said he would vote for nominees like him in the future.

Gorsuch has already been the deciding vote in cases that hinder women's healthcare rights, immigration rights, and workers rights. And with Justice Anthony Kennedy announcing his retirement, it is terrifying to think of what could happen with another extreme justice on the bench.

The stakes just reached a new level. The choice of who replaces Kennedy is literally a decision that will shape our country's future for generations.

[**We cannot allow Bob Hugin and Donald Trump to load the Supreme Court with conservative extremists. Help us fight back by making sure Bob Menendez is re-elected in November. Chip in today >>>**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c9f/3af3c5d/3b558c34/4ec3b8cc/2481199697/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_scotus?gpsid=5_73_1774&refcode=em18_180629_Kenn-W_fnd_gq_nopn__MS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180629_Kenn-W_fnd_gq_nopn__MS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+We+cannot+allow+Bob+Hugin+and+Donald+Tru")

Bob Hugin applauded Mitch McConnell's efforts to delay the nomination of Merrick Garland, allowing Donald Trump to send Gorsuch to the Supreme Court in his place.

Now, Trump and his Republican allies in the Senate are already licking their chops at the opportunity to replace Kennedy with another extreme Supreme Court Justice.

Bob Menendez will work tirelessly to ensure that the people of New Jersey have a say in this decision and that a fair and qualified candidate who will uphold the rights of workers, women, immigrants, and the LGBTQ community is nominated.

But we need you to rise up. We need you to organize. We need you to stand with strong Democratic Senators like Bob Menendez in this election. We need to do whatever we can to stop lackeys for Donald and McConnell from getting to the U.S. Senate.

[**It has never mattered more. Chip in $5 or more and show Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell you're standing with Bob Menendez and our shared American values.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c9f/3af3c5d/3b558c34/4ec3b8cf/2481199697/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_scotus?gpsid=5_73_1774&refcode=em18_180629_Kenn-W_fnd_gq_nopn__MS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180629_Kenn-W_fnd_gq_nopn__MS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+It+has+never+mattered+more+Chip+in+5+or+")

Thank you,

Michael

Michael Soliman
Campaign Chair
Menendez for Senate

**[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c9f/3af3c5d/3b558c34/4ec3b8ce/2481199697/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_scotus?gpsid=5_73_1774&refcode=em18_180629_Kenn-W_fnd_gq_nopn__MS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180629_Kenn-W_fnd_gq_nopn__MS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+DONATE")**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: more on two new attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Kimberly sent you a message earlier Peter. I wanted to follow up quickly. According to _Politico, "One Nation, a McConnell-aligned nonprofit, is launching a multistate digital ad blitz[...]"_ They're spending $100,000 on that buy, part of which is airing in Ohio. Another group, the Judicial Action Network, is also running a "seven-figure campaign on national cable and digital platforms[...]" Part of that is also running in Ohio. **These groups want nothing more than to see me defeated and replaced with my Trump-allied opponent, Congressman Jim Renacci.** And as the spending climbs, so does the importance of reaching our goals. [**The FEC deadline is in a few hours, and we're still about $13,890 short. If you can, give $5 or more towards my re-election campaign.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff998/4462dc26/56daf3d4/2007a887/2899639857/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjMwcG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYSJ9/ amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff998/4462dc26/56daf3d4/2007a887/2899639857/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjMwcG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180630pm?refcode=sbe180630pm_a_other&refcode2=3268183")** Trump doesn't need another ally in the Senate. The person in this seat needs to fight like hell for the families of Ohio. Ohio's Senator should fight to fill the new Supreme Court vacancy with someone who will preserve women's rights and workers' rights, affirm civil liberties, and equality. Ohio's Senator should work to raise wages, lower prescription drug costs, expand access to health care, and preserve Medicare and Social Security. President Trump and Vice President Pence have both come to Ohio, attacked me, and threw their support behind my opponent. It's not shocking. Multi-millionaire Congressman Renacci works for them and the special interests. **I work for Ohio families.** That's why special interests attack me. And that's why I rely on supporters like you, chipping in whatever they can, to keep this campaign going strong. [**Contribute $26 to help us hit our quarterly goal.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff998/4462dc26/56daf3d4/2007a887/2899639857/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjMwcG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180630pm?refcode=sbe180630pm_a_other&refcode2=3268183") With gratitude, Sherrod

subject: The newest update from Brad and Steve:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | I just spoke with Brad and Steve, and I want to share the latest update with you.

**On Wednesday, I shared that we have to raise an additional $50,000 before my critical FEC deadline. As it stands, we 're still $9,945 from closing our budget gap.**

We need to raise this additional money to respond to ads launched by the Koch brothers. Plus, this FEC report will be pored over by everyone -- the media, my opponents, and dark-money groups -- to gauge whether I have the strength to win my first reelection campaign in November.

****_[With less than 24 hours to go, we can't miss the mark. Will you pitch in $10 before midnight tonight to help us close our new budget gap?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+With+less+than+24+hours+to+go+we+canrsqu&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180630_1_8&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180630_1_8&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180630_1_8")_****

name: Jessica Morse
subject: before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/IwmloGKtGW1Q7wFmUuYfF2ZDkIPopqJWUcB6gWZKxQw=/2yZj7kI9Uj4fQDo2c0bteB6FQh71nGDVTD6l7ygLClc=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180630_JM_deadline1_ndnr_logo)
Team, after our primary victory, everyone kept asking me if I was taking a break. I laughed and said, "It's like winning a marathon and having someone announce--congratulations, it's an Iron Man race! Keep going!"
We are charging forward. I didn't rest after June 5th, because I had a big goal coming up: our June 30th end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. As you know, at the end of each quarter, our fundraising numbers go public, and that allows people to size up our race--will we have the resources to get our message out to thousands and thousands of voters across the district?
**Let 's show our strength. We have just $5,756 to go to hit our goal before tonight--before midnight, will you make a donation to help us leave McClintock in the dust?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
_**[Express Donate: $5](https://act.myngp.com/el/IwmloGKtGW1Q7wFmUuYfF2ZDkIPopqJWUcB6gWZKxQw=/2yZj7kI9Uj4fQDo2c0bteB6FQh71nGDVTD6l7ygLClc=?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180630_JM_deadline1_ndnr_expresslane-_5)**_

_**[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/IwmloGKtGW1Q7wFmUuYfF2ZDkIPopqJWUcB6gWZKxQw=/2yZj7kI9Uj4fQDo2c0bteB6FQh71nGDVTD6l7ygLClc=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20180630_JM_deadline1_ndnr_expresslane-_100)**_
_**[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/IwmloGKtGW1Q7wFmUuYfF2ZDkIPopqJWUcB6gWZKxQw=/2yZj7kI9Uj4fQDo2c0bteB6FQh71nGDVTD6l7ygLClc=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20180630_JM_deadline1_ndnr_expresslane-_250)**_
_**[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/IwmloGKtGW1Q7wFmUuYfF2ZDkIPopqJWUcB6gWZKxQw=/2yZj7kI9Uj4fQDo2c0bteB6FQh71nGDVTD6l7ygLClc=?refcode=20180630_JM_deadline1_ndnr_expresslane-_other)**_
The press, pundits, and McClintock's team will be studying these fundraising numbers to see if we're coming prepared to this fight. Just like with Conor Lamb and Doug Jones, when a race gets attention, voters and volunteers get excited to make calls, donate, and support us. [_**Thanks to this team, we 've outraised McClintock before--so let's do it again.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/IwmloGKtGW1Q7wFmUuYfF2ZDkIPopqJWUcB6gWZKxQw=/HcoLWwImfNL-RjMl9qoRgIfay4LuH3J_pHkE9LYDM04=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180630_JM_deadline1_ndnr_l1)
Help me show that we can out-message McClintock and his special interest donors like the Koch Brothers. Having your support makes this feel less like an Iron Man and more like a team relay--so I'm passing the baton to you.
Thank you,
Jessica

clean_body: I hope you're getting the opportunity to relax with your friends and family as we prepare to celebrate Independence Day. | | Peter - I hope you're getting the opportunity to relax with your friends and family as we prepare to celebrate Independence Day. I know I am! My team gave me a fundraising update and we're just shy of hitting our June goal. I'm honored to have your support as we work together to restore civility to our national discussion and do what we can to encourage our elected leaders to have the courage to reach across the aisle and find compromise for the American people. It's been done before and it can be done again. Thank you for all that you are doing to help in this effort. There's a lot more work to do! -John "Facebook" "Twitter" "Web Site" "Instagram" "YouTube" Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: Last email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Peter --
Just like when I was governor, I plan on keeping my promises during this campaign. And that means this really will be the last email you’ll receive from our campaign about tonight’s deadline. I’m grateful for your patience.
[**I hope you’ll give me one more chance to explain what tonight’s fundraising deadline is all about, and why your contributions of $10 or more are so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1538655/8276680/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjRlMDc1Zi1hNDdjLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTJURGdVGc6qNvByV8pkQJmY4o2KBQ6UVdUmeU3HSLw=&refcode=em180630-eoq6-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1538656/8276681/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjRlMDc1Zi1hNDdjLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTJURGdVGc6qNvByV8pkQJmY4o2KBQ6UVdUmeU3HSLw=&refcode=em180630-eoq6-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=true)**
When we launched our campaign earlier this year, very few pundits or Washington politicians gave us much of a chance of pulling this off. They didn’t think it was possible that, in 2018’s political environment dominated by hyper-partisanship, a campaign as different as ours could take on the status quo and win.
They said we wouldn’t have the right poll-tested message, the grassroots energy, or the financial support to win. **Well thanks to your help, they’ve been wrong about pretty much everything.**
Our message of bringing people together to get things done is gaining traction with voters across Tennessee who are fed up with the rancor and dysfunction in Washington and who are ready to fix Congress. We’ve made this race competitive, we’re seeing a flood of new volunteers, and we’re challenging Washington’s conventional wisdom.
[**Tonight’s End-of-Quarter deadline is about making sure we have the resources to keep this up. By pitching in $10 or more tonight, you’ll help us keep proving the pundits and partisans wrong.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1538657/8276682/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjRlMDc1Zi1hNDdjLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTJURGdVGc6qNvByV8pkQJmY4o2KBQ6UVdUmeU3HSLw=&refcode=em180630-eoq6-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1538658/8276683/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjRlMDc1Zi1hNDdjLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTJURGdVGc6qNvByV8pkQJmY4o2KBQ6UVdUmeU3HSLw=&refcode=em180630-eoq6-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=true)**
I want to make you another promise: this campaign will always be focused on the issues that matter to Tennesseans.
That means building an economy that works for all Tennesseans. That means making health care more affordable for families, and fighting back against the opioid crisis. And that means taking on the national debt that threatens our kids and grandkids.
If we keep working together to get this message in front of voters, I know we can keep up our momentum and win this U.S. Senate seat in November.
Thanks for being a part of this campaign,
—Phil Bredesen
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1538659/8276684/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjRlMDc1Zi1hNDdjLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTJURGdVGc6qNvByV8pkQJmY4o2KBQ6UVdUmeU3HSLw=&refcode=em180630-eoq6-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=true)**

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: reaching out one last time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
We're just hours away from our big FEC deadline, and I wanted to reach out to say thank you for standing with me.
It's support from people like you that allows me to focus on fighting for hard-working families (including those being ripped apart at the border), finding bipartisan solutions for the opioid crisis, and protecting access to reproductive health care.
Before we close the books on June, I have to ask you one last time:
[**Can you please give $3 or more right now so that we can end the quarter on a high note? It 's looking like we'll hit our goal, but $3 from you will really ensure that we get there.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0eb/2a380d31/f73c2d9/f1ab77/1666073337/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDYzMF9FT1FzYXR1cmRheV9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180630_EOQsaturday_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
I am so grateful to have you by my side. You make it possible for me to stand up to the worst parts of President Trump's agenda.
Your donation of just $3 before midnight lets me spend my time ensuring that Congress focuses on helping people like you, not corporate special interests. It means that I can spend less time fundraising and more time moving a progressive agenda forward.
If you're able to give before tonight's deadline, I would be incredibly grateful. Here is the link:
[**https://hassan.bsd.net/June-Deadline**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0eb/2a380d31/f73c2d9/f1ab77/1666073337/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDYzMF9FT1FzYXR1cmRheV9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180630_EOQsaturday_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan

name: U.S. Senator Brian Schatz
subject: We are fighting for the soul of our country, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
If you want to do something to fight back, right now is the time.
---
If there is any lesson we should take from this debacle of a week, it's that we cannot stop fighting for one second in these midterm elections.

Elections have consequences, Derek -- and right now we're in a fight for the very soul of our country. Everything we hold dear is on the line this November -- _Roe v. Wade_ , affordable health care, voting rights, organized labor, equal protection, climate change, and so much more. So I am asking you directly:

**Today is a critical time to stand with Democrats. Will you chip in $3 before midnight's FEC deadline to help take back Congress and state legislatures nationwide?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052113f/4067b0a/6602d0bc5/7fb053c7/3649287515/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bs-june-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180630_bes_s1&source=em_20180630_bes_s1&refcode=em_20180630_bes_s1")

[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052113f/4067b0a/6602d0bc5/7fb053c3/3649287515/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bs-june-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180630_bes_s1&source=em_20180630_bes_s1&refcode=em_20180630_bes_s1")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052113f/4067b0a/6602d0bc5/7fb053c0/3649287515/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bs-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180630_bes_s1&source=em_20180630_bes_s1&refcode=em_20180630_bes_s1")
** We have to pour everything we've got organizationally, financially, emotionally, and politically into turning this around -- not just in September, October, or November. We need to do it right now.

There are so many incredible first-time candidates, women, and people of color who won their primaries this month. They are ready to organize, fight back, and stand up to the Trump administration -- and they're counting on us to help them win in November.

**[Before midnight tonight, chip in $3 to take the fight to Trump and his Republican Party. If you've been waiting to join this fight and want to do something to make a difference, now is the time.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052113f/4067b0a/6602d0bc5/7fb053c1/3649287515/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bs-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+%0ABefore+midnight+tonight+chip+in++if+con&utm_campaign=em_20180630_bes_s1&source=em_20180630_bes_s1&refcode=em_20180630_bes_s1")**

Thanks for stepping up,

Brian Schatz
U.S. Senator, Hawaii

P.S. The other side fights hard, and they fight together. If we don't match them, we will lose -- and for the sake of generations to come, we cannot lose. **[Chip in $3 before midnight's deadline, and let's go win the next election.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052113f/4067b0a/6602d0bc5/7fb053ce/3649287515/VEsFBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bs-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+Chip+in++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+ma&utm_campaign=em_20180630_bes_s1&source=em_20180630_bes_s1&refcode=em_20180630_bes_s1")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052113f/4067b0a/6602d0bc5/7fb053cf/3649287515/VEsFBg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=33+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180630_bes_s1&source=em_20180630_bes_s1&refcode=em_20180630_bes_s1").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052113f/4067b0a/6602d0bc5/7fb053cc/3649287515/VEsFAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180630_bes_s1&refcode=em_20180630_bes_s1").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052113f/4067b0a/6602d0bc5/7fb053cd/3649287515/VEsFAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180630_bes_s1&refcode=em_20180630_bes_s1"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052113f/4067b0a/6602d0bc5/7fb053ca/3649287515/VEsFAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=36+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180630_bes_s1&source=em_20180630_bes_s1"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052113f/4067b0a/6602d0bc5/7fb053cb/3649287515/VEsFAg/ "http://www.Democrats.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=37+-+wwwDemocratsorg&utm_campaign=em_20180630_bes_s1&source=em_20180630_bes_s1&refcode=em_20180630_bes_s1"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
clean_body: If you want to do something to fight back, right now is the time. If there is any lesson we should take from this debacle of a week, it's that we cannot stop fighting for one second in these midterm elections. Elections have consequences, Derek -- and right now we're in a fight for the very soul of our country. Everything we hold dear is on the line this November -- Roe v. Wade , affordable health care, voting rights, organized labor, equal protection, climate change, and so much more. So I am asking you directly: Today is a critical time to stand with Democrats. Will you chip in $3 before midnight's FEC deadline to help take back Congress and state legislatures nationwide? "" "" "" "" "" "" We have to pour everything we've got organizationally, financially, emotionally, and politically into turning this around -- not just in September, October, or November. We need to do it right now. There are so many incredible first-time candidates, women, and people of color who won their primaries this month. They are ready to organize, fight back, and stand up to the Trump administration -- and they're counting on us to help them win in November. "" Thanks for stepping up, Brian Schatz U.S. Senator, Hawaii P.S. The other side fights hard, and they fight together. If we don't match them, we will lose -- and for the sake of generations to come, we cannot lose. ""

name: Jay Inslee
subject: We must show Trump that his actions are unacceptable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
This is our chance -- but we hit the deadline at midnight.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78e19/2f5ea88d/77c6f170/2cbc1e39/1657131098/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-june-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-06-30_eom-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-06-30_eom-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-control-nd&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, I wouldn't be emailing you right now if it weren't important. name: Mel Hall
subject: I’ll be frank with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/nxR9K2SolNGImrMFgCpy5DqV15HDu8yKplvmAAyQ-BA=/GJq_-wMRyobnTJ1yBO7t1JGYBmgrSuZamesk0ftkWe0=?refcode=em180630pm)

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

We're hours away from closing the books on a big FEC fundraising deadline. It's so important that we demonstrate the incredible strength of our campaign, and enthusiasm for bringing integrity and accountability to Washington.

[**Let 's make this a fundraising report that cannot be ignored. Make a contribution of $5 or more to say you're with me before midnight tonight.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nxR9K2SolNGImrMFgCpy5DqV15HDu8yKplvmAAyQ-BA=/GJq_-wMRyobnTJ1yBO7t1JGYBmgrSuZamesk0ftkWe0=?refcode=em180630pm)

I'll be frank with you. Traveling the district, meeting new people, talking about increasing health care access and affordability, and creating good-paying jobs--that's fun, invigorating, and inspiring.

FEC fundraising deadlines--less so.

But with just four months to go until Election Day, my team and I are making critical decisions about how to get our message to voters here in Indiana's 2nd District. The more resources we have, the stronger our plan can be. And a big number will leave zero doubt that our campaign is the real deal, and momentum is on our side.

**Chip in $5, or whatever you can give, before tonight 's big deadline. **

_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/nxR9K2SolNGImrMFgCpy5DqV15HDu8yKplvmAAyQ-BA=/GJq_-wMRyobnTJ1yBO7t1JGYBmgrSuZamesk0ftkWe0=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em180630pm)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/nxR9K2SolNGImrMFgCpy5DqV15HDu8yKplvmAAyQ-BA=/GJq_-wMRyobnTJ1yBO7t1JGYBmgrSuZamesk0ftkWe0=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em180630pm)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/nxR9K2SolNGImrMFgCpy5DqV15HDu8yKplvmAAyQ-BA=/GJq_-wMRyobnTJ1yBO7t1JGYBmgrSuZamesk0ftkWe0=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em180630pm)
[Express Donate: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/nxR9K2SolNGImrMFgCpy5DqV15HDu8yKplvmAAyQ-BA=/GJq_-wMRyobnTJ1yBO7t1JGYBmgrSuZamesk0ftkWe0=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=em180630pm)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/nxR9K2SolNGImrMFgCpy5DqV15HDu8yKplvmAAyQ-BA=/GJq_-wMRyobnTJ1yBO7t1JGYBmgrSuZamesk0ftkWe0=?refcode=em180630pm)

I'm so proud of the campaign we are building, together. Thank you for your continued support.

Mel Hall

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: At midnight
body:
Midnight tonight is our first fundraising deadline of the general election. |
---

| |
\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Friend, Midnight tonight is our first fundraising deadline of the general election. When our fundraising report goes public, I would love to see your name right there with the rest of Team Abrams. That's why I want to ask you, personally, to make your first contribution to my campaign. Chip in $3 here to stand with me: **[http://secure.staceyabrams.com/june_deadline](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaae3/34a064cc/b29f13f/70f7054/4207268580/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNjMwMThFT1EtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-eoq?refcode=IE063018EOQ-1-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=1+-+httpsecurestaceyabramscomjunedeadline&utm_campaign=IE062818EOQ4&source=IE062818EOQ4")** Thank you for believing in our movement, and thank you in advance for stepping up to make our vision Georgia's reality. Knowing that you're standing beside me makes the long days (and nights!) on the campaign trail easier. Sincerely, \- Stacey

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: Angry about Trump potentially getting to pick another Supreme Court Justice? Me too. Here's how you can fight back:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Friends, the stakes of winning our race against Ted Cruz have never been higher.
This week, the Supreme Court handed down a ruling that upheld the travel ban. Then, Supreme Court Justice Anthony Kennedy signaled that he's retiring, giving Trump the opportunity to nominate a justice of his choosing -- _a lifetime appointment_.
**We heard from many of you this week who are upset and asking "What can I do?" And here's my answer: "Take a deep breath, then get back to fighting for Beto." Our campaign needs you now more than ever.**
Trump's Supreme Court nominee will need 51 votes in the Senate. And right now, thanks to your support, we're within single digits of beating Senator Ted Cruz and putting a stop to a dangerous nominee. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. We need you NOW.
[**Ted Cruz will be a rubber stamp for Trump's nominee for the Supreme Court. That's why we need you to rush a donation of $3 to help Beto unseat Cruz. Rush a donation to our campaign and make sure we reach our critical end-of-quarter goal by midnight tonight.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92054/3b1d797/7a1e8dae/35a99fea/3384179050/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180630-eoq8-v1s3&amount=3")
We set an incredibly steep end-of-quarter goal this June, but I know this grassroots team has what it takes to meet it. Every single dollar we raise before tonight's deadline will have a tremendous impact on our campaign -- and our path to winning in November.
Justice Kennedy stepping down from the Supreme Court has raised the stakes of our campaign to take on Ted Cruz to an unprecedented new level. If Beto wins, it could literally make a difference for generations.
[**Rush a donation of $3 to our campaign to take on Ted Cruz right now. We need to raise $200,000 online before midnight tonight if we're going to stay on track. Every dollar into our campaign will go a long way to winning this make-or-break race in November.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92054/3b1d797/7a1e8dae/35a99fea/3384179050/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180630-eoq8-v1s3&amount=3")
We can't do this without you.
Thanks,
Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas
**[Donate $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92054/3b1d797/7a1e8dae/35a99fea/3384179050/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180630-eoq8-v1s3&amount=3")**

It’s been a busy week on the campaign trail, but I’ve got some exciting news to share.

First of all, I want to send a quick note to thank all of the Hoosiers who have already stepped up because they believe in our conservative message.

I’m humbled by your confidence and support.

Second of all, we are really close to hitting our June End of Quarter Fundraising Goal.

We only need $2,782 more to hit our $25,000 goal and demonstrate that our conservative, pro-Trump agenda is exactly what Sixth District Hoosiers want.

I know I can count on my fellow Hoosiers to make this last push to hit our goal before midnight tonight and keep our momentum going all the way to November.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
| | | Team,

We're closing in on our ambitious end-of-quarter fundraising goal.

That means we're close to reporting our strongest numbers yet, making it unmistakably clear we have the grassroots strength to win Arizona's Senate seat. But we're not there yet.

**[With only 8 hours left until midnight, we still need to bring in $5,055 to meet our goal -- and we still have the double match running!](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+With+only+8+hours+left+until+midnight+we&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_90DO_180630_2_12&source=KS_EM_FR_90DO_180630_2_12&refcode=KS_EM_FR_90DO_180630_2_12")**

Can you chip in $10 to help get us there? Please use this link so your donation comes in before midnight and is counted in our critical FEC filing:

**[http://act.kyrstensinema.com/JuneDoubleMatch](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+httpactkyrstensinemacomJuneDoubleMatch&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_90DO_180630_2_12&source=KS_EM_FR_90DO_180630_2_12&refcode=KS_EM_FR_90DO_180630_2_12")**

**We must ensure our opponents and their special-interest backers know this campaign is powered by thousands of grassroots supporters like you. We 're ready to take on Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies -- and win.**

With your help today, we can keep up our statewide momentum and expand our grassroots outreach. Your donation before midnight ensures Kyrsten's message of fighting for all Arizonans reaches households across the state.

Thanks for standing with Kyrsten at this pivotal moment in our campaign.

Reba

name: Mark Osmack
subject: The last word
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri
body:
Dear Friend,
We are approaching the end of the quarter, and we have been going strong. Everyone has been stepping up and contributing what they can, and we are gaining support and strength every single hour. This is truly what a grassroots campaign looks like, and I am proud to stand with you all as we courageously fight to change the direction of this country. We cannot afford to stand by and do nothing as this Administration takes us down a frightening path.

We are almost there. I need you now. We have less than 6 hours left to come together and make a difference. We are extremely close to our goal.

Help us get there. Help us win. Let's make change happen. We can do this, together.
If you can, contribute here before midnight tonight: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markformissouri](https://act.myngp.com/el/LkPvOsY06kNp3mODp6czU8ZTprFogh1p3UO-OeS-yEE=/iUhl9oXXVCBGxSjbV5prjJTj3wgvO53ZbV3NP0-2Yzo=)
Respectfully,
Mark

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: A quick follow up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

Together with some great volunteers, our team knocked on hundreds of doors today and spoke with the people of the 7th District about the issues that matter most to them.

While the team was out canvassing, I got word from our finance director Emma that thanks to your help, we're now only $1,200 away from meeting our end of quarter fundraising goal!

This is great news; meeting this crucial deadline sends a powerful message that **we have what it takes to flip the 7th.** But we can't send that message if we don't hit our goal in the next five hours.

**[Can I count on your help?](https://act.myngp.com/el/HUTk0m4oEgNLcjigFPejn1k5NBXe8p2ABdvMt9ON88c=/g1GLy6uaCOnP8sJAlWM08hx-FRJmndDqvRHLcxT7DUg=?refcode=asfc63018)** Midnight marks the end of the first fundraising quarter of the general election, and a lot of people will be waiting to see our numbers to make sure we're the real deal. Let them know just **how real our campaign is with a****[donation tonight.](https://act.myngp.com/el/HUTk0m4oEgNLcjigFPejn1k5NBXe8p2ABdvMt9ON88c=/g1GLy6uaCOnP8sJAlWM08hx-FRJmndDqvRHLcxT7DUg=?refcode=asfc63018)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HUTk0m4oEgNLcjigFPejn1k5NBXe8p2ABdvMt9ON88c=/g1GLy6uaCOnP8sJAlWM08hx-FRJmndDqvRHLcxT7DUg=?refcode=asfc63018)
Thank you for your support and we'll see you on the doors soon!

Best,

Abigail

P.S.: If you've already donated to our end-of-quarter goal and this email accidentally made its way to your inbox, thank you! We truly appreciate your support!

clean_body: Hi Peter, Together with some great volunteers, our team knocked on hundreds of doors today and spoke with the people of the 7th District about the issues that matter most to them. While the team was out canvassing, I got word from our finance director Emma that thanks to your help, we're now only $1,200 away from meeting our end of quarter fundraising goal! This is great news; meeting this crucial deadline sends a powerful message that we have what it takes to flip the 7th. But we can't send that message if we don't hit our goal in the next five hours. Midnight marks the end of the first fundraising quarter of the general election, and a lot of people will be waiting to see our numbers to make sure we're the real deal. Let them know just how real our campaign is with a Thank you for your support and we'll see you on the doors soon! Best, Abigail P.S.: If you've already donated to our end-of-quarter goal and this email accidentally made its way to your inbox, thank you! | Listen -- Senator Nelson's seat is critical to winning the Senate majority. We're putting everything we've got into defeating Rick Scott.

But the fact is, Florida's governorship cannot go to the Republicans. We have got to fight both of these fights. **_We cannot afford to lose either one, because our state 's future is at stake._

**I 'm huddling with the team now, and we're only $9,540 shy of our expanded $50k goal.**

The race for Florida's governorship is on track to be the most expensive ever. This is history in the making for Florida -- but not the good kind.

Here is why: Rick Scott has rewritten the playbook for Florida Republicans. Adam Putnam and Ron DeSantis and running campaigns focused solely on pleasing the donor class.

**The Republicans have lost any reason to protect the middle class. In the Age of Trump, all that matters to them is winning over their special-interest donors.**

[**If the GOP is able to BUY Florida 's governorship, we'll have eight more years of Rick Scott-style Republican extremism. We NEED your support before we submit tomorrow's FEC report. It's the single most important report of this election. Contribute $5 right now to make your contribution.**](http://act.floridadems. Florida Democrats **** **** **** **** **** ****

We're up against another deadline, team, and we cannot afford to fall short again. We missed our goal last month and we had to cut back our organizing efforts and advertising budget. Fewer Pennsylvanians heard our message as a result, and we can't let that happen again this month.

[**_There are only two more end-of-quarter deadlines between now and Election Day, and we can 't miss another goal. Can you help us raise another $3,218 before midnight? Even $5 goes a long way._**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180630_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Ever since I voted against the anti-middle-class tax scheme, Republicans have been coming after me _hard_. The President himself personally recruited my opponent, announcing his endorsement _from the White House lawn_. This administration has its sights set on PA this year, and we cannot afford to lose.

**We need to have a strong showing on our FEC report this quarter, or Republicans will smell blood in the water. Your support has gotten us this far -- can you give another $5 or more today to help meet our end-of-quarter goal?**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/deadline](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180630_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks for coming through when it counts.

Bob

**That 's why I couldn't be more thrilled that a group of donors just offered to match every gift until our critical $75,000 end-of-quarter FEC deadline to help us flip this state _and_ the Senate blue - and protect the future of the Supreme Court.** You've already heard from Elizabeth Warren, Jason Kander, and Harry Reid. name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: An email that won't ruin your weekend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
I hope you believe me when I say the political revolution has arrived. Just look at the evidence:
#
Friends,
In the middle of a shockingly bad news week, did you manage to catch the glimmers of hope that are keeping me going? It was easy to miss - but this was an incredible week for progressives. I hope you believe me when I say **the political revolution has arrived. Just look at the evidence:**
* Our Revolution-endorsed candidates **Ben Jealous** (MD governor) and **Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez** (NY-14) won upstart races as part of a slate of **11 winning candidates** , with 4 more races that are too close to call.
* The DNC Rules and Bylaws Committee moved forward with a proposal to **eliminate all superdelegate votes** on the first ballot of a contested presidential nomination.
* Thousands of people across the country organized to **Keep Families Together** and create a humane immigration policy with comprehensive reform.

And it's for the fights ahead of us, evident this week, that Our Revolution exists. We're ready for them, and I know we can win. Why? Because Alexandria was outraised by her opponent **10-to-1 and _still_ won**. Because Ben won by being explicit about the bold progressive vision we all are working towards. **Senator Bernie Sanders showed us how our very participation in this process, even if it is just chipping in a few bucks, is a revolutionary act, and the grassroots victories that can come from that support.**
[**We are setting an ambitious goal before midnight to get 500 new recurring donations to boost organizing efforts for our next slate of primary candidates. Can you chip in before our six-month fundraising deadline at midnight?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa49/bed43eb/66f5af91/75fd30f9/26684821/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180630&noskip=true&recurring=true")
With the very foundation of our politics being disrupted, people are questioning the status quo and what our representatives should stand for now more than ever. Like Alexandria said, we do not need to wait one hundred years for Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, or a green energy economy. **We can do these things right now --all it takes is political courage and a will to organize.**
Working in tandem with candidates, volunteers, and local groups, you are transforming the Democratic Party and reimagining what is possible in our politics. It is about more than a single Supreme Court justice or the term of one president--this is about creating a better future.
[**Pitch in any amount and help us reach 500 new recurring donations before our six-month fundraising deadline at midnight.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa49/bed43eb/66f5af91/75fd30f9/26684821/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180630&noskip=true&recurring=true")
Thank you for helping build this revolution. With these hands, we will continue to rise.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa49/bed43eb/66f5af91/75fd30f9/26684821/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180630&noskip=true&recurring=true")**

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: The inside story of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Voters of America
body:
When we first started our campaign.
#

Dear friends,
When we first started our campaign, the political establishment and corporate media counted us out. They said we didn't have a chance. They said our ideas were "radical" and "fringe." They said you couldn't do well unless you had a super PAC and raised big bucks from the wealthy and large corporations.
But what I said from the beginning was that people should not underestimate us. And what we proved - together - was if you run a campaign that speaks to the needs of the working people in this country and asks them to stand up and fight back not only for their futures, but for their kids as well, they will respond. And they did.
We took on almost the entire political, financial and media establishment in this country and we ended up winning over 13 million votes, 22 states and more votes from young people than Trump and Clinton combined. We did it by relying on people to organize themselves in their communities and we did it without traveling across the country begging millionaires and billionaires for money.
My campaign manager, Jeff Weaver, just wrote an excellent book about our historic campaign. It gives you an inside view of what happened. And before tonight's FEC deadline comes to a close, I want to offer you a special opportunity that will help advance our political revolution, while sharing a behind-the-scenes account of our campaign. Here it is:
**[Make a $27 donation to Progressive Voters of America ahead of tonight's official FEC fundraising deadline, and they will send you a copy of Jeff Weaver's great new book "How Bernie Won."](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pva_weaver?refcode=em180630-t1-full-a "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pva_weaver?refcode=em180630-t1-full-a")**
The political revolution that we launched was never just about winning the White House. It was about building a movement of millions of Americans uniting to transform American politics and to transform our country. It was based on the understanding that real change always comes from the bottom on up, not from the top on down.
That is exactly what we are accomplishing. Ideas that we have advocated for years are now widely accepted by the American people. Equally important, all over the country working people and young people are running for office, often for the very first time. And they are winning!
**A lot of that is because of our campaign, and Jeff 's insightful book shares the inside story of how it all happened. Make a donation before midnight tonight and Progressive Voters of America will get the book out to you right away.**
**[Make a $27 donation to Progressive Voters of America ahead of tonight's official FEC fundraising deadline, and they will send you out a copy of Jeff Weaver's new book "How Bernie Won." Your donation will help me travel the country as we work hard to elect progressives ahead of November's elections.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pva_weaver?refcode=em180630-t1-full-a "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pva_weaver?refcode=em180630-t1-full-a")**
At a time of growing income and wealth inequality, and with 40 million Americans living in poverty, I will be campaigning hard not only in blue states, but in states and communities that Trump won. But I cannot do it alone. Your donation helps. Thank you.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
******[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pva_weaver?refcode=em180630-t1-full-a "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pva_weaver?refcode=em180630-t1-full-a")******
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). name: Dan Lipinski (personal)
subject: the final count
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
We're only a few hours away from our most important FEC fundraising deadline so far. All eyes are on our fundraising strength, and a lot of people in the media and the GOP are waiting to see our numbers.

I'm committed to flipping the House and righting the wrongs of the past year and a half.

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c41a6/24c69fd9/18eb91f7c/18836fc6/3902605950/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER82N_digital_email_20180630_KennedyRRNonOpens_inact&source=WQEFER82N_digital_email_20180630_KennedyRRNonOpens_inact")
---

Peter,

This week, we received some devastating news from the Supreme Court:

Justice Anthony Kennedy is retiring, giving Donald Trump the opportunity to nominate another anti-choice Supreme Court justice.

The stakes could not be higher. This individual will have the power to repeal _Roe v. Wade_ -- endangering the lives of tens of millions of American women, jeopardizing our health care, and undermining our rights.

We've endorsed two women, **Jacky Rosen** (NV) and **Kyrsten Sinema** (AZ), who can flip the two seats we need to take back the Senate and give Democrats approval over Trump's nominees. We have to win.

**Donate $3 now to help pro-choice Democratic women flip the Senate and defend the right to choose:**

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

subject: FWD: The radical left doesn't belong in the Hoosier State
body:
| | | | | Team,

I want to make sure you saw this email from Congressman Banks yesterday. We're just a few hours away from our fundraising deadline, and every small amount you're able to contribute will help us reach our goal.

Thank you for your support!

Steve Justus
Campaign Manager

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Jim Banks** <[info@jimbanks.us](mailto:info@jimbanks.us)>
Date: Fri, Jun 29, 2018 at 4:36 PM
Subject: The radical left doesn't belong in the Hoosier State
---
|
---
| | | Friend,

Democrats are moving further and further to the left, and their agenda is becoming even more radical. Their intentions to abolish ICE, open our borders, impeach President Trump, and use taxpayer dollars to fund abortions have been made perfectly clear.

[Will you please chip in today to help us reach our fundraising goal by tomorrow's deadline?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=1e9e5dcfcc&e=bfe3be83a5)
[](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=0f0ee93c2d&e=bfe3be83a5)
**Our opponent is a Bernie Sanders liberal, and just like Barack Obama got her start in politics as a community organizer in Chicago. She is the most liberal candidate to ever run in our district, and belongs to the party who wants to put Nancy Pelosi back in the Speaker's chair.**

We need true conservatives in Congress who will fight for our Hoosier values and support President Trump's America First agenda. [Will you join us in this fight?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=3cb5119500&e=bfe3be83a5)

Working for you,

Jim

name: Kim Howard, Team Morse
subject: last call—Jessica needs your help before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
Team, did you see Jessica's note? Today is our vital end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and she needs your help.
[_**Jessica is not going to rest until we have what we need to win and get our country on track. With this team 's help we've out-fundraised McClintock before--now, let's do it again. **_](https://act.myngp.com/el/REkd4jQ9atfYueQ3t55KW--QsS_RRkSn4CSRUZiadhM=/aOlG14VpHpAUt7S4MrsMRF8R6_RcaKkVdYIeIYGT4HY=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180630_KH_deadline2_ndnr_l1)
Thanks for doing what you can,
Kim
Kim Howard
Campaign Manager
Morse for Congress

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Jessica Morse
Date: Sat, Jun 30
Subject: before midnight
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/REkd4jQ9atfYueQ3t55KW--QsS_RRkSn4CSRUZiadhM=/WmbyH9NJMWMhGHe_QRcvJ0MA0ViIJ-ZLmdIRq7MvImQ=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180630_KH_deadline2_ndnr_logo)
Team, after our primary victory, everyone kept asking me if I was taking a break. I laughed and said, "It's like winning a marathon and having someone announce--congratulations, it's an Iron Man race! Keep going!"
We are charging forward. I didn't rest after June 5th, because I had a big goal coming up: our June 30th end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. As you know, at the end of each quarter, our fundraising numbers go public, and that allows people to size up our race--will we have the resources to get our message out to thousands and thousands of voters across the district?
**Let 's show our strength. We have just $5,756 to go to hit our goal before tonight--before midnight, will you make a donation to help us leave McClintock in the dust?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

subject: DEADLINE: Midnight Tonight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress
body:
Can you help me before midnight tonight? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2f727866d52f/deadline-midnight-tonight?e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| |
---
| |
## There is no time to waste!

**_Tonight at midnight_** is the end of quarter fundraising deadline. This is our final fundraising report before elections.

Liberal elites like George Soros will be pouring millions of dollars into races across Arizona and if we don't keep up with Democrats and special interest groups brisk fundraising we could lose our Republican majority in the 2018 midterms. _Send me back to Washington DC to fight for you_.

President Trump and House Republicans are fulfilling the promises made to the American people, and as your voice in Congresses I will continue to fight for our shared conservative values.

Now, I'm confident we'll hit our goal of $35,000 by midnight tonight... but we still have a ways to go and no time to lose.

[Please consider a contribution now. ](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=85a24749a3&e=7ca82c1e3d)

I am asking you to help me one more time to make this our strongest quarter yet. Help us send a clear message we will keep Arizona Red, keep control of the House of Representative and you support the work our team has been doing for District 4 and Arizona!
---
|
---
| **Dr. Paul Gosar
Member of Congress
Arizona's 4th District**

Friend, I'm Ben Ray Lujan, the chairman of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee. My district, New Mexico's Third, shares a large border with Arizona's First, and every day in Congress, I see that Tom O'Halleran is a fierce advocate and an independent voice for Arizona families. That's why I'm proud to serve with him in Congress, and why it's critical that we make sure Tom wins re-election in November. **Tom has a big fundraising deadline coming up tonight at midnight, and he 's $2,023 short of his goal, so I'm just going to come out and ask:** [**Can you make a donation of any size right now to re-elect Tom?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.06.30_b1_brl_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Friend, Tom is one of the hardest working people I know in Congress. He goes to work every day to make life better for his constituents. But Republicans are targeting Tom this fall because they know unseating him will make it easier for them to hold onto the House majority -- so winning in November won't come easy. AZ-01 is one of the GOP's few blue-to-red pickup opportunities, so they're going to fight tooth and nail to defeat him. **It 's absolutely imperative that we re-elect Tom so he can continue serving Arizona families -- and so Democrats can take back the House in November.** [**Friend: Tom needs your support to keep AZ-01 blue. Can we count on you to chip in $5 before his midnight deadline?**](http://action.tomohalleran. Friends, this is it: **We have just SIX hours to hit our most important end-of-month goal, and right now we still need to raise $3,826 to turn New Hampshire blue.**
We know President Trump will move the Supreme Court to the right, threatening everything from Roe v. Wade and LGBTQ rights to access to quality, affordable health care and the right to vote. Chris Sununu doesn't have the best interests of women or working families at heart - and that's why we MUST elect Molly Kelly governor to be the first line of defense in stopping Trump's anti-women agenda in New Hampshire.

name: Team Scholten
subject: ✍️ Email Rewrite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
This was supposed to be an email that talked about how we only have a couple hours left until tonight’s midnight reporting deadline, and that we only need a little more to hit our goal.
But here’s the thing... Because of the incredible response we’ve had, we already surpassed our goal! **THANK YOU!**
This gives us a real chance to outraise Steve King for the third quarter in a row, and we can’t stress enough how much we appreciate your support. The only problem is, we can only guess how much he’s raised. While we're powered by grassroots support, Steve King continues to rely on donations from corporate PACs. **We’re counting on our people-powered movement to continue to be louder and larger than the PACs willing to support him.** [**_Help us keep up the pace with a contribution before midnight tonight!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1539821/8282689/-1552532074?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzIxZGNiYi1kYTdjLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U9R93N_ruhRCD9GWF2BnmJ-K9_pjUKHb6KHIVEiqx48=)
To be clear, outraising Steve King isn’t just about bragging rights. Quarterly fundraising is a benchmark that rating services like the Cook Report and Sabato's Crystal Ball use when accessing viability for races. Our fundraising is also something that national progressive groups look at when deciding whether or not they should invest in this race. **As J.D. said recently, “My team didn’t come here just to put on a uniform—we came to play.”**
[**_Please consider chipping in whatever you can before midnight tonight!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1539822/8282690/-1552532074?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzIxZGNiYi1kYTdjLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U9R93N_ruhRCD9GWF2BnmJ-K9_pjUKHb6KHIVEiqx48=)
**Let’s put everyone on notice that we’re in this to win it. **
And again, thank you so much for your support!
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1539823/8282691/-1552532074?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzIxZGNiYi1kYTdjLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U9R93N_ruhRCD9GWF2BnmJ-K9_pjUKHb6KHIVEiqx48=)

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: My commitment to you
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3007/9e00690/46c3e72f/2402de9b/3919155105/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180630_EOQ6_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180630_EOQ6_fnd_gq_act__AG")
Friends,

I've stood up to President Trump when he's torn immigrant families apart and targeted them with executive orders.

I've beaten the NRA and gun lobby in court twice to make sure you can't shoot guns in our city parks.

And I've welcomed same-sex couples to get married in Tallahassee when they were shut out around the state.

I've never shied away from standing up for the people I represent -- and that's exactly what you'll get when I'm Governor, but I need your help.

**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 before midnight tonight to help me meet my last big fundraising deadline before my primary in August? All gifts from Florida voters are matched, doubling our efforts.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3007/9e00690/46c3e72f/2402de9a/3919155105/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1748&refcode=em18_180630_EOQ6_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180630_EOQ6_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+chip+in++ask++befo")**

My parents both worked hard; my mother as a bus driver and my father as a construction worker. Sometimes we struggled to make ends meet, but I still grew up rich in opportunity.

My lived experience mirrors the vast majority of Floridians, and I know that experience is going to help me be a Governor for all of us.

**[On August 28, we have the opportunity to prove everyone who doubted us wrong -- so please, chip in $5 before my end-of-quarter deadline tonight.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3007/9e00690/46c3e72f/2402de9d/3919155105/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1748&refcode=em18_180630_EOQ6_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180630_EOQ6_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+On+August+28+we+have+the+opportunity+to+")**

Bring it home,

Andrew

clean_body: "" Friends, I've stood up to President Trump when he's torn immigrant families apart and targeted them with executive orders. I've beaten the NRA and gun lobby in court twice to make sure you can't shoot guns in our city parks. And I've welcomed same-sex couples to get married in Tallahassee when they were shut out around the state. I've never shied away from standing up for the people I represent -- and that's exactly what you'll get when I'm Governor, but I need your help. "" My parents both worked hard; my mother as a bus driver and my father as a construction worker. Sometimes we struggled to make ends meet, but I still grew up rich in opportunity. My lived experience mirrors the vast majority of Floridians, and I know that experience is going to help me be a Governor for all of us. "+" Bring it home, Andrew "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 1550 Melvin Street, Tallahassee, FL 32303

name: Team Casey
subject: deadline at midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61e2/51dbcc2a/1b5c27c5/3a4c60f/2110598791/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Team -- we're in trouble.

This month, the Republican National Committee announced that they're hiring at least 500 field staffers in battleground states, including Pennsylvania.

With the numbers we've put up so far this month, Bob just can't compete with that. Trump has spent months signaling to his rich and powerful allies that they needed to help Congressman Lou Barletta win this seat. The RNC has already knocked on over 195,000 doors in Pennsylvania in support of the president's anti-middle-class tax scheme, and that's just the tip of the iceberg.

If we don't raise $3,700 by the fundraising deadline at midnight, then we'll have to start pulling our ads off the air, making it even harder to compete with the RNC's ground game. **_[Chipping in just $5 goes a long way towards making sure we can keep getting Bob's message out -- can you help out?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180630_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Bob continues to fight against the Trump administration's dangerous and divisive agenda with both fists up -- from their attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act to their corporate Supreme Court nominees, but because of that, the GOP is going all in to try and flip this seat. 500 field staffers are just the start, and we need to be ready for whatever they throw at us next.

**Now, more than ever, Bob needs your help to hold off the GOP 's attacks so he can keep fighting for Pennsylvania. Can you help defend him?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180630_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180630_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180630_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180630_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks.

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180630_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Jacky
subject: the future of the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Nothing less than the future of the Supreme Court is on the line right now in Nevada, team.
The only way Democrats can stop Donald Trump from permanently altering the court is by taking back the Senate, and **_POLITICO_ says "Democrats have almost no shot at winning back the Senate majority" if we lose in Nevada.**
**That's why Elizabeth Warren, Kirsten Gillibrand and Harry Reid are all in - but we're facing a critical FEC fundraising deadline in just a few hours, and polls show this race is neck and neck. We're still $10,000 short of our goal, so a group of donors is DOUBLING all gifts - but the only way we can win is if grassroots supporters like you give right now:**
**[Please, give $5 or more now (your donation will be matched!) before midnight to win in Nevada, take back the Senate and protect the future of the Supreme Court.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd68b/4fbb2af3/7dce20a2/5e8bc37c/3883802758/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc0NS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk745-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for stepping up at such a critical moment.

Jacky
|
**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126** | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd68b/4fbb2af3/7dce20a2/5e8bc37d/3883802758/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=email_footer&amounts="). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd68b/4fbb2af3/7dce20a2/5e8bc37a/3883802758/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd68b/4fbb2af3/7dce20a2/5e8bc37b/3883802758/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support.
Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible.
